name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Donald Trump fought the establishment—and won
body:
Donald J. Trump won the presidency by challenging both the Republican and Democrat Party establishments.

https://www.whitehouse.gov/1600daily/
The White House • October 28, 2020

** Donald Trump fought the establishment—and won
------------------------------------------------------------
Donald J. Trump won the presidency by challenging both the Republican and Democrat Party establishments. For too long, the political class—including party leaders, paid consultants, lobbyists, donor-funded think tanks, partisan media, and more—ignored the concerns of millions of working- and middle-class American families.

These families didn’t see themselves as Democrat or Republican. They saw themselves as Americans. And they wanted change.

Career politicians didn’t get the message. Rather than listen to the American people, the establishment chose to lecture them instead. Democrats in Congress could’ve joined with President Trump and Republicans to work on infrastructure, immigration, healthcare, the economy, our military, and more.

Instead, Democrats spent four years obstructing that agenda, wasting time—and tens of millions in taxpayer dollars—on political and media stunts.

While the left resisted the American people’s will, President Trump went to work.

He replaced NAFTA, something both Republican and Democrat politicians promised to do for years. His United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-united-states-mexico-canada-agreement-delivers-historic-win-american-workers/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) rebalances trade, protects American labor, and levels the playing field for U.S. manufacturers and automakers.

He cut taxes for over 80 percent of Americans by lowering rates for middle-income families (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-historic-tax-cuts-delivering-real-savings-creating-opportunity-americans/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) , doubling the child tax credit, and nearly doubling the standard deduction.

He ended the Obama-era War on Energy. Rather than relying on foreign oil, today America is the number one producer of oil (https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/president-trump-is-restoring-american-energy-dominance/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) and natural gas in the world. Last year, for the first time in 67 years, America exported more energy than it imported.

He stood up to Big Pharma, including taking executive action to permit the safe, legal importation of prescription drugs from Canada and elsewhere. In 2018, Americans saw the biggest drop in prescription drug prices (https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/congress-didnt-act-on-prescription-drug-prices-so-president-trump-did/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) in more than half a century.

He slashed income inequality as wages grew faster for workers than for managers (https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/blue-collar-labor-boom-reduces-inequality/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) and fastest for Americans without a college degree.

He paused immigration to ensure that Americans are first in line for jobs as the country safely reopens from the pandemic. He also closed visa loopholes (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/trump-administration-taking-action-tighten-foreign-worker-visa-requirements-protect-american-workers/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) that allowed companies to replace American workers with low-cost foreign labor.

He fixed our justice system, reforming the Clinton-era crime bill that sent too many young Black men to jail. Today, America has its lowest Black prison rate (https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/washington-secrets/under-trump-black-prison-rate-lowest-in-31-years-hispanics-down-24) in 31 years.

He rebuilt our military, secured the largest raise for our troops (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-fulfilling-promise-rebuild-nations-military-support-troops/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) in a decade, and became the first American President since Ronald Reagan not to start a war.

He held the VA accountable for failing our veterans, signing the VA Accountability Act and removing more than 2,500 employees (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-administration-honoring-commitment-nations-veterans/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) for misconduct and other issues.

He used bold diplomacy to secure peace deals across the Middle East (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/jared-kushner-trump-israel-peace-deals) , supporting our allies instead of starting wars or giving cash to terrorists in Iran.

He protected Medicare and Social Security—including from socialist “Medicare-for-All” (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/exposing-congressional-democrats-complete-government-takeover-healthcare/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) schemes, which would kick 180 million Americans off their health plans.

He made the single-largest investment in our national parks and public lands in history, signing the Great American Outdoors Act (https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/president-trump-signs-great-american-outdoors-act-preserving-protecting-national-parks/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) to protect our natural heritage.

He defended American patriotism from those who want to tear it down, literally, by increasing penalties on those who vandalize or destroy monuments (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-combating-violence-protecting-americas-monuments-memorials-statues/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) and memorials.

He grew the strongest economy in history, with record-high incomes and record-low unemployment (https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/incomes-hit-record-high-poverty-reached-record-low-2019/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) and poverty rates for Americans once left behind—including Black Americans, Hispanic Americans, and others.

And today, as America reopens from the global Coronavirus pandemic, our country is witnessing its fastest economic recovery (https://www.nationalreview.com/2020/10/comparing-the-trump-pence-and-obama-biden-recoveries/) in history.

Americans outside of our nation’s political class see these results. A majority of our citizens now say they are better off today than they were 4 years ago (https://content.gallup.com/origin/gallupinc/GallupSpaces/Production/Cms/TGBCMS/hobqwcnhcuohd8gvv29fjq.png) . In fact, more Americans say they are better off after President Trump’s first term than said so after the first terms of Barack Obama, George W. Bush, or even Ronald Reagan.

The American people wanted change. The establishment didn’t listen. Fortunately for families all across our country, President Trump did—and he’s just getting started.

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
President Trump boards Air Force One in La Crosse, Wisconsin | October 27, 2020

Privacy Policy (https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | Contact the White House (https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact/) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e2c6227c99)

============================================================
The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Final Argument
body:
The choice is clear... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-s/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Final Argument](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-j/)
In this week's blog, I discuss the upcoming election and make my case why this will be one of the most important elections in a generation. In my race, the Ohio 1st District, will voters continue to support me, a fiscal conservative, who is pro-life, pro-police and has the experience to support our community through the pandemic - or will they support an anti-police, anti-capitalism, extreme want-to-be radical who will rubber-stamp Pelosi and AOC's laundry list of job killing Marxist policies. I would like to believe, the choice is clear! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [2 Weeks to Go!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-d/)
It's hard to believe that the much-anticipated 2020 election is almost upon us. And in some ways, it actually already is, as many people in our state and across the country have already voted by absentee ballot, or by early-voting at the local board of elections. In this week's blog, I will give you my best prediction as to what will happen and who will be victorious. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [The Green New Disaster](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-u/)
My opponent, Kate Schroder, and I met for two debates last week. I hate to use the word "lie" when talking about another person, but that's exactly what Ms. Schroder did a number of times during both debates. In this week's blog, I discuss these lies and one particular one that will get your blood boiling. She supports AOC's Green New Deal, which could cost our country $93 trillion, or your household approximately $600,000! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Debates and More Debates](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-n/)
Well, it's that time of the campaign cycle - time for debates. In this week's blog post I discuss my thoughts on last week's Trump-Biden debate and clue you into a series of local debates, with yours truly, that you will not want to miss! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-p/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-x/)
### [A Stark Choice: Support the Police, or Undermine Them](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-m/)
As you can imagine, there are a lot of differences between myself and my opponent on the issues. However, none are as stark as my record of supporting the police, and my opponent Kate Schroder's record of undermining them. That is why this past Monday, I received the endorsement of both Dan Hils, President of the Cincinnati FOP, and Hamilton County Sheriff Jim Neil, who was elected Sheriff twice as a Democrat. In this week's blog, I discuss why now, more than ever, we need to support our police and first responders. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-c/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-q/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-a/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-f/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-z/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-v/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujkilit-kujkulhluu-e/)

subject: The left's plan to win? Lie, lie, lie!

body:
Fight back: We need your URGENT help in the final week! No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xtiitdt-ahkdjtlkr-u/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtiitdt-ahkdjtlkr-r/) PeterYesterday, my opponent went up on the radio and sent an email to his followers with **ridiculous lies** blaming me for just about everything wrong with the world today.We can't force them to be honest on the campaign trail. But we can **FIGHT BACK** with everything we've got![**Please, will you c**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtiitdt-ahkdjtlkr-y/)[**hip in $15, $40, $75, or $250 today to help fight back the Democrats' nasty attack ads?**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtiitdt-ahkdjtlkr-j/) You've seen all the headlines - Republicans are getting out-raised, out-spent, and out-campaigned in the final week before this critical election. We need to do our part to close the gap! [Chip in $15, $40, $75, $250 or any amount!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtiitdt-ahkdjtlkr-t/) The Democrats in Wisconsin are pulling out all the stops in the final week.
* They've got **Hollywood celebrities** hosting big-money fundraisers for the state party.
* They're injecting **hundreds of thousands of dollars** into last-minute money on races throughout Wisconsin to boost turnout.
* They're **lying about me on the radio and in their emails,** and putting serious money behind the effort to pull out a win in the final week of this campaign!

Please, take a moment to [join us, fight the Democrats' wave of cash, and WIN on Election Day! ](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtiitdt-ahkdjtlkr-i/)Thanks,
Scott Fitzgerald

subject: Senate Polling Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
There are several new public polls that we wanted to share with
you as we are now just days away from what could be the most
important election in our lifetime.

Fellow Conservative:

There are several new public polls that we wanted to
share with you as we are now just days away from what could be
the most important election in our lifetime.

➤ Georgia - Sen. David Perdue (+1)
➤ Iowa - Sen. Joni Ernst (+1)
➤ Michigan - John James (-1)
➤ Montana - Sen. Steve Daines (+1)

These races are very competitive and will determine
whether Chuck Schumer and the Democrats take over the Senate.

Please support these four conservative Senate
candidates with a secure online contribution right now.

No amount is too small.

The Democrats are beating us in candidate
fundraising because they're raising significantly more
small-dollar contributions.

But we love our country and we want to keep it
great, and I know we can match the liberals and push our
candidates to victory.

Control of the Senate will be decided very soon so
please do what you can right now.

Thank you for considering this request and for doing
so much to help fight for conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

Support These Senate Candidates Before It's Too Late

Sen. Joni Ernst (R-IA)

Sen. David Perdue (R-GA)

John James (R-MI)

Sen. Steve Daines (R-MT)

DONATE HERE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: Taylor Campaign
subject: This race is about contrasts.
body:
The difference is stark.
---
| | | | | | Thursday, October 29th 2020
---
|
---
| What we are fighting for...
---
| This race is about contrasts. The choice is clear.
Elaine supports Nancy Pelosi over 90% of the time. In contrast, in a commitment to bipartisanship, Scott Taylor proactively secured a Democrat co-sponsor on every bill that he introduced while in Congress.
Elaine's gun control proposals -like banning suppressors- do not focus on the root of gun violence. In contrast, Scott Taylor support our 2A rights and only supports intervention that would prevent tragedy, like greater access to mental health resources.
Elaine has the worst constituent services in the state of Virginia. In contrast, Scott Taylor worked to deliver metric tons of PPE to Virginia at the onset of this pandemic because whether he is our elected official or a private citizen, Scott is committed to leadership that serves our community effectively. Scott co-sponsored legislation to mandate protections for healthcare access for Americans with pre-existing medical conditions (H.R. 628).
Elaine proposes tax increases in the wake of the pandemic that will crush our businesses. In contrast, Scott Taylor is endorsed by the small business community and will work to ensure families keep more of the money they earn. While Elaine's votes would harm our police and make our communities less safe, Scott Taylor is endorsed by the law enforcement community.
The choice in this race is clear. If you believe what Scott believes for Virginia's future, we need your support NOW in this critical election!
---

In contrast, Scott Taylor worked to deliver metric tons of PPE to Virginia at the onset of this pandemic because whether he is our elected official or a private citizen, Scott is committed to leadership that serves our community effectively. Scott co-sponsored legislation to mandate protections for healthcare access for Americans with pre-existing medical conditions (H.R. 628). Elaine proposes tax increases in the wake of the pandemic that will crush our businesses. In contrast, Scott Taylor is endorsed by the small business community and will work to ensure families keep more of the money they earn. While Elaine's votes would harm our police and make our communities less safe, Scott Taylor is endorsed by the law enforcement community. The choice in this race is clear. If you believe what Scott believes for Virginia's future, we need your support NOW in this critical election! | | | == | | Your donation today will help our campaign fund critical, election-end efforts. This is a very competitive race, and the outcome will likely be determined by just a few hundred or thousand votes. name: Congressman Andy Barr
subject: YOU can make the difference
body:
Can I count on you?
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jujupx-kujkulhluu-u/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujupx-kujkulhluu-r/) Friend, this is Andy Barr, Congressman from Kentucky's Sixth District. My friend Steve Chabot and I are both running in key districts that we need to defend, and I wanted to reach out to you to remind you just how serious this race is. Our day-to-day American livelihood, limited government, freedom of speech, and institutional conservatism are at stake--friend, we must do something about it. [**To help Steve in these final days, I wanted to reach out to you and see if you would consider chipping into our 'Preserve America' fund for a limited time TWO times match.**](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujupx-kujkulhluu-y/) [PRESERVE AMERICA](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujupx-kujkulhluu-j/) **Every dollar chipped in for the next 48 hours** will go directly toward ensuring that voters all across Ohio's first district hear the conservative message that my friend and colleague Steve Chabot continues to promote. I can't bear the thought of watching this district be flipped by Steve's radical and Far-Left opponent who wants to hike Ohio's taxes, strip away it's constitutional rights and freedoms, and try to transform Ohio for the worse, for good. If this happened, you could say 'goodbye' to our STRONG conservative values, and welcome in the liberal values of Nancy Pelosi's extreme agenda. [**Friend, there are just a few days until ballots are cast and a decision is made. **](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujupx-kujkulhluu-t/)[**I need you to chip in RIGHT NOW to help preserve America. **](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujupx-kujkulhluu-i/)Can I count you in? \-- Andy Barr | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujupx-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujupx-kujkulhluu-h/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujupx-kujkulhluu-k/)

name: Senator Sherrod Brown
subject: Ohio needs Betsy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Peter, Sherrod Brown here -- and I'll cut to the chase. I want you to support Betsy in her race for this open seat. This race for State Senate is one we can and must win. With the newest appointment to the United States Supreme Court, we will have to rely more than ever on state legislatures to protect the rights of individuals on issues like healthcare, women's reproductive rights and LGBTQ+ rights. As Senator, I've seen first-hand the way gerrymandering and the culture of corruption have pushed our Ohio state legislature to the extremes on issues like these. This year we've got to elect people who will stand up for everyone and who will get rid of gerrymandering next year when districts are redrawn. **Betsy is a person of character and strength, and after knowing her for several years, I know we need her in Columbus. **She respects the dignity of work. She's a civil rights lawyer who comes from a working class background and will always do what's best for all the people she represents, regardless of their party. And more simply, we need level-headed, solution oriented people in the statehouse, not more partisan in-fighting. **Did you know the Republicans have spent more on Betsy 's race than on any other race in Ohio? ****They 're spending big money on attack ads lying about her because they know she can win, and they know she's beholden to regular people, not big-money special interests. That terrifies them.** That's exactly why I'm emailing you today. If you've donated already, please dig deep and donate one more time. If you haven't supported Betsy yet, now is the time to help out. It can make all the difference in a race this close. **[The polling is in her favor! But only if she gets her message out, and to do that we just need supporters like you to chip in what you can.](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEWDlKUt348H7EwbNc8PI43Vgep6dTxeGsSW8vPPPXA=/_JUMHLpyhbNnJpIV24UdFdbfx9uY5DdKegf_7qj5CnY=?refcode=sherrod)** Then, most importantly share this message with 5 friends - _and make sure they 're voting!_ _Sincerely,_ _Sherrod Brown, Ohio Senator_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEWDlKUt348H7EwbNc8PI43Vgep6dTxeGsSW8vPPPXA=/hcTaSzelALTMHV8nTHwB9WIdoYMsgnIPE90oZtnZDnE=?refcode=sherrod&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEWDlKUt348H7EwbNc8PI43Vgep6dTxeGsSW8vPPPXA=/hcTaSzelALTMHV8nTHwB9WIdoYMsgnIPE90oZtnZDnE=?refcode=sherrod&amount=50) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEWDlKUt348H7EwbNc8PI43Vgep6dTxeGsSW8vPPPXA=/hcTaSzelALTMHV8nTHwB9WIdoYMsgnIPE90oZtnZDnE=?refcode=sherrod&amount=255) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEWDlKUt348H7EwbNc8PI43Vgep6dTxeGsSW8vPPPXA=/hcTaSzelALTMHV8nTHwB9WIdoYMsgnIPE90oZtnZDnE=?refcode=sherrod&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEWDlKUt348H7EwbNc8PI43Vgep6dTxeGsSW8vPPPXA=/hcTaSzelALTMHV8nTHwB9WIdoYMsgnIPE90oZtnZDnE=?refcode=sherrod) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEWDlKUt348H7EwbNc8PI43Vgep6dTxeGsSW8vPPPXA=/ghcqJa0SuegAkZ_fCjjXODxrKrg9qmCyD0v_D72V-Jk=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEWDlKUt348H7EwbNc8PI43Vgep6dTxeGsSW8vPPPXA=/o8F1nRnLBUV7mJ4Bp-jR6uWQKXVQDQlnCbok8yjkvhY=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEWDlKUt348H7EwbNc8PI43Vgep6dTxeGsSW8vPPPXA=/Xp-Gequ6xAdYP930NCYcwlgtFMYbI5b7G8XJOgZFn0Y=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEWDlKUt348H7EwbNc8PI43Vgep6dTxeGsSW8vPPPXA=/qF0At4K9WMBnKQLym0SgSrA9YBgSMblVskAgAs1_U4Q=)

| Patriot,
Only 5 days to go!
We are now in the final push to Election Day, and now is the time to finish the job we've started. Our message of the America-First agenda resonates with folks here in Northwest Florida because it puts their interests and values at the forefront.
Now is our chance to fight against COVID-19 and get our economy back on track, get Floridians back to work, and keep our families safe. We need to support our small businesses and provide the American people the relief they need during this difficult time. Unlike the Democrats that have obstructed every Republican effort to get relief to our communities.
We cannot afford 4 years of Democrat leadership in the White House, nor can we stand for another 2 years of Nancy Pelosi's iron first in the House. We need to get out the vote this year, and flip the House red on November 3rd!
We are looking for the final boost to surge our voter outreach campaign and reach more people with the message of the America First agenda, but we need your help. [Can Matt count on you to rush in to help us with 5 days left?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e36wTLpmUTuXdRIISqY4lrLRPrEsVJHIQlgmHV3h6CKC0QBEMZvHon1IYPnOQk7Sq-QscjnI0wh2_xm93K0Vdj0VTSY0h5QaA_-p9WVZHKJY_1D1659PTJtJGaYp2Th1yvOlhU1cdDglCLixIIL1e18kSSEhgpakICEUGJ8mAY8=&c=pSrdM5qolI3PJHRUVDPhjVsKTgFi7a03IiM5GGlnsyKoYU6rBBUXQA==&ch=wWZN4QZm-0Oy9_3R0bgGEPkehP660hqxoBaDRnksclqgqtdCWkk_Ww==)

name: The James Team
subject: RE: Budget Meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James For Senate, Inc
body:
We've attached the budget report below for you to see. |

Peter... This isn't the best news, but we know you'd want to know.

We just stepped out of a budget meeting less than 5 days before the election and it's looking like we'll be forced to cut critical GOTV (Get Out the Vote) efforts going into the most crucial time of our campaign, if we don't have more patriots step up and chip in.

We know you've fought hard for John throughout the campaign and we've done our best too. It's killing us right now that we are not able to get over the top after TWO YEARS of traveling across Michigan to show that our campaign is about SERVICE and not PHONY PROMISES like Gary Peters' campaign.

John is absolutely distraught at the thought of letting down the people of Michigan and conservatives across the country who are banking on us winning so we can save the Senate. If you can do anything to help rush support by using this link, it may save the entire campaign and our nation's future: **[CLICK HERE](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56722583:sfUSmhKNQ:m:1:1155937413:DB2C49C025B85655661F6AC5A9369AB1:r)**

We've attached the budget report below for you to see.

Thank you,

Team James

subject: Can’t volunteer? Here’s how to help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
We have a critical need in the last few days of the election! Tap or click >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469878?e=1acd9bb3d6)

| id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

| Hoosier Republican,

There are just days left until the 2020 election. We have thousands of Hoosier volunteers working around the clock in Indiana to get out the vote, and they need your help.

We understand that not everyone has the ability to volunteer their time, but you can still help elect our Republican ticket as they’re working to keep Indiana moving forward.

**[Will you chip in to help with the vital funds we need to keep our grassroots volunteers going?](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5aecf26d3c&e=1acd9bb3d6) **It is critical that we keep them out in the field, going full steam ahead until the polls close on November 3rd.
---
id:2020-10-21-20:11:58:254t
---
| [FUND OUR GRASSROOTS VOLUNTEERS NOW >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0b364d6f55&e=1acd9bb3d6 "FUND OUR GRASSROOTS VOLUNTEERS NOW >>")
---
| **Every bit helps. For $5, we can feed a volunteer lunch. For $10, we can ensure they have the campaign materials needed to pass out to voters. For $50 we can pay for the yard signs our team is placing across the state!**

As you can see, there are countless aspects of our grassroots operations that we could use your help funding as we get down to the wire for Election Day.

Please don’t miss this opportunity to help where we need it the most!

Thanks,
Team Indiana GOP

name: Team Oberweis
subject: Find your ballot drop box location
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/620ad73dc722dd79/4166ad3ebf6a80a7c3d6b838967d376c/34533) Peter, If you’re still making your plan to vote in Illinois, don’t forget that you can return your completed ballot via secure drop box!
Each local election authority decides on the appearance of their own drop box, but they all share one thing — they are a secure alternative to mailing your ballot back. These boxes have been specially designed to prevent tampering, are placed in highly visible areas, and kept locked at all times.
**You can find your closest ballot lock box by[CLICKING HERE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/620ad73dc722dd79/3afd69d65a60e938c3d6b838967d376c/34533).**
Jim is counting on every single Republican to vote by November 3rd. This is going to be a tight race, and we have to defeat socialist Lauren Underwood! She’s a radical left liberal who votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time, and she needs to GO.
Please help us flip this critical seat RED, and get one step closer to taking back our majority in the House!
Thanks,
Team Oberweis

We have to keep the momentum going! This is the most important election of our lifetimes and there is so much at stake. Please make a plan today to early vote before the early voting period ends.

body:
Instead of campaigning, he was helping Andrew Gillum.
| Friend,
---
Thanks to your support, Charlie Crist is terrified of our campaign.
---
In 2018, Charlie didn't even set foot on the campaign trail. He knew his seat was safe, so he spent his time campaigning for Andrew Gillum instead.
---
But this time around, Charlie is campaigning every single day, because he sees the same numbers I do -- _we *can* win this race._

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Did You See This Poll
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_in_control_202010&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **The new[KSTP/SurveyUSA poll](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=ajhWKI9uptiH6_g4lFnkCv6IVDlWjeixYoMBg7tfNqBvKxc9p_0O7CtyY_nNDt98k4kBa2Bf3BmXbvR3bL9zdwKh8do2LC4s8a8USTHV7pdHgDb_hw-ifjsoHeMo8efG8qd7UdHhvuyQl3z-4MoaGKtRSx1lGjYF2eJTJk5BXfs&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_in_control_202010&n=2) shows Trump & Biden in a virtual dead heat. When accounting for the margin of error, Trump appears to have tied Biden in the latest numbers. ** We're seeing this happen in the Minnesota legislative races. Voters are breaking for Republicans. Remember, we only need four more votes in the Minnesota House. Last minute spending is EXTREMELY important to push us over the edge. Are we about to End Walz' Emergency Power??? **Imagine watching the results come in on November 3rd and Walz' House posse LOSE.** But, if politicians like Brad Tabke, John Persell and their liberal buddies get sent back to St Paul by the voters, we're going to be forced to live under Walz' tyrannical dictates for another year. It's been 230 days of this so-called emergency that Walz has used to take away our liberties, shut down our businesses and compromise our children's education. Now with more COVID cases, our Tyrant-in-the-Making is threatening continued shutdowns. On top of that, school districts in Minnesota are meeting and moving towards going 100% distance learning. None of these Democrats seem to care about your opinion. So it's time to make your opinion matter on November 3rd. **But I'm afraid election day will come and we won't be able to get our message out to all the voters. You can take that fear away by contributing to our Final Advertising Blitz.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/shutdown_kings?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_in_control_202010&n=3) If we want to End Walz' Emergency Powers, politicians like these guys MUST go! **We need your help to fully fund our Final Advertising Blitz. Can we count on your support?** | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_in_control_202010&n=4 "FINAL ADVERTISING BLITZ") [FINAL ADVERTISING BLITZ](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_in_control_202010&n=5)
---
We've shown what we can do with your support. When we started this campaign to End Walz' Emergency Powers, we only got 15 votes. Now we're four votes shy of terminating them for good!
If politicians Brad Tabke, John Persell, Dan Wolgamott and gang don't want to listen to us in St Paul, then it's time their voters hear about their crummy politician's record.
## [Support the Final Advertising Blitz!](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_in_control_202010&n=6)
Thank you in advance for your contribution.
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S.****[Please help us make these Democrats pay for voting against our liberty. Pitch in $100 for our Final Advertising Blitz. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or for max pain, donate $1,000.](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_in_control_202010&n=7)**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_in_control_202010&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_in_control_202010&n=9).

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Thom Tillis Committee
body:
If our seats go, then you can say goodbye to our Senate majority.
| Friend,
---
Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi are raising money to defeat me and Senator Thom Tillis for the work we did in putting Judge Amy Coney Barrett on the Supreme Court.
---
They know that our seats have become incredibly competitive after our opponents outraised us by a combined $50 MILLION.
---
_With that much money, they 're dominating the airwaves between now and Election Day, trying to BUY the elections._
---
If we are both defeated, then you can say goodbye to our Republican Senate majority. That's why I'm asking for your urgent support in the final hours.
---
[**Please make a contribution to help me and Senator Tillis fight back against the non-stop attack ads the left-wing donors and Super PACs are running to buy these Senate seats!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HsCn3TWDXOrNTfy6bU_3g_4zerDna6Pg4sR3DVfsOmqq5hYW3-0JM6kR376CWhqrjnvd7waKUzUiWo0YP45BeDgr_GXrRg2sdQxe6eLFPQDM7wmljHitBGe0rWldrVHx6aoWwCdftgE0XaxDQjzVx0-QyJNVxAoYsglwnaZ4lm5iXHGVAdeN65UnChpDZ-wl3AYjdX_uaeQY_CVlT1cqAalWemtOx6-cjBvTzo1NjXLY1Qb9hoDWjEe8dkeis0jR94zE3HoRBjn3aXbHRZI70EOL6iKKITvnIwO16xAMOZKCO6Q9DsVHUA==&c=SOxPlXbddgGdQOW4HUOjOlLH3HqGIS4VzmsSdjJkIIm6FhJUr20HXg==&ch=0f8gc4inaZIAyW2OcE0kV8kxxKWdw85hP7e7wZZjV36srQBnrp9FEg==)

**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HsCn3TWDXOrNTfy6bU_3g_4zerDna6Pg4sR3DVfsOmqq5hYW3-0JM6kR376CWhqrjnvd7waKUzUiWo0YP45BeDgr_GXrRg2sdQxe6eLFPQDM7wmljHitBGe0rWldrVHx6aoWwCdftgE0XaxDQjzVx0-QyJNVxAoYsglwnaZ4lm5iXHGVAdeN65UnChpDZ-wl3AYjdX_uaeQY_CVlT1cqAalWemtOx6-cjBvTzo1NjXLY1Qb9hoDWjEe8dkeis0jR94zE3HoRBjn3aXbHRZI70EOL6iKKITvnIwO16xAMOZKCO6Q9DsVHUA==&c=SOxPlXbddgGdQOW4HUOjOlLH3HqGIS4VzmsSdjJkIIm6FhJUr20HXg==&ch=0f8gc4inaZIAyW2OcE0kV8kxxKWdw85hP7e7wZZjV36srQBnrp9FEg==)**

But while the Left attacks us for doing what's right for America, I'm hoping that patriots like you will rush to our defense to help us win our "toss-up" races.
---
_We can 't defend the Republican majority - and our conservative agenda - without your help!_

[**Will you partner with me and Senator Tillis to fight back against the left-wing dark money groups that are trying to buy our Senate seats?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HsCn3TWDXOrNTfy6bU_3g_4zerDna6Pg4sR3DVfsOmqq5hYW3-0JM6kR376CWhqrjnvd7waKUzUiWo0YP45BeDgr_GXrRg2sdQxe6eLFPQDM7wmljHitBGe0rWldrVHx6aoWwCdftgE0XaxDQjzVx0-QyJNVxAoYsglwnaZ4lm5iXHGVAdeN65UnChpDZ-wl3AYjdX_uaeQY_CVlT1cqAalWemtOx6-cjBvTzo1NjXLY1Qb9hoDWjEe8dkeis0jR94zE3HoRBjn3aXbHRZI70EOL6iKKITvnIwO16xAMOZKCO6Q9DsVHUA==&c=SOxPlXbddgGdQOW4HUOjOlLH3HqGIS4VzmsSdjJkIIm6FhJUr20HXg==&ch=0f8gc4inaZIAyW2OcE0kV8kxxKWdw85hP7e7wZZjV36srQBnrp9FEg==)

Lindsey Graham

Senator Tillis and I will NEVER apologize for fulfilling our constitutional obligation to confirm a Supreme Court justice as qualified and remarkable as Justice Barrett! But while the Left attacks us for doing what's right for America, I'm hoping that patriots like you will rush to our defense to help us win our "toss-up" races. We can 't defend the Republican majority - and our conservative agenda - without your help! == Thank you, Lindsey Graham P.S. == Both of our races are critical to keeping our GOP Senate majority, so thank you for stepping up to help. Paid for by the Thom Tillis Committee == | | Thom Tillis Committee | PO Box 97396, Raleigh, NC 27624 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativenewsalert.net powered by

Ok, team. Texans have been turning out by the millions to vote in this election — with over 8 million ballots cast, we’re leading the nation. **Early votes cast are quickly approaching __the total vote for 2016__.** There are only 36 hours left in early voting. We need to make sure that Texans in the 17th District go vote with all the facts: **Pete Sessions is a corrupt, power hungry Washington politician.** He’s repeatedly voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. He’s a diehard partisan who would rather move his house then change his mind — even when voters have already rejected him. **That’s why we’re working so hard to elect Rick. His priorities are Texas’ priorities like expanding health care access, improving rural broadband access, and getting relief to families who are affected by the sagging economy.** **But voters won’t know this if we can’t tell them.[_Our final end-of-month fundraising drive is over at midnight on Saturday, and we still need to raise $8,230 to fund our home-stretch outreach operations._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20931625/258908634/-1907457921?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201029EOM4_TK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGMxZDQ0YS0wNzFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjEY93DaEcY1qD8q_WiNi30vWhOXSTgUQXjLxRALfJk=)** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | | **[Donate $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20931626/258908635/-1907457921?express_lane=true&amount=10&fl_email_fr_20201029EOM4_TK_all_xx_abx10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGMxZDQ0YS0wNzFhLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjEY93DaEcY1qD8q_WiNi30vWhOXSTgUQXjLxRALfJk=)**

name: Mary Mancini
subject: When it happens
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
TODAY IS THE LAST DAY TO VOTE EARLY IN TENNESSEE. Early voting is quick, easy, and gives you the most flexibility for whatever your schedule looks like today, so MAKE YOUR PLAN to vote RIGHT NOW. Turnout is way up! Everyone is voting because America needs an overwhelming Democratic victory to heal the soul of our nation. Specific information on locations and times to early vote can be found by clicking here [https://tnsos.org/elections/election_commissions.php] .
Whatever happens on Election Day, one thing has been made clear: The Republican party is going to try and discredit every blue win they can and we need to be prepared.
The TNDP is working to make sure we have the voter protection resources we need to continue our fight for a fair election, even if that fight goes beyond November 3 rd . Right now, we need your help. We are not going to let the GOP steal any elections.
Can you make a donation right now, so that we are prepared for whatever happens? If 2020 has taught us anything, it’s that we need to be ready for anything. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

subject: He wants to dismantle our economy?

body:
Protect Texas jobs.
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s7DQT7NxhnBwguCp9pGkXYNSkPHJfkQHrDUuWJDTijGwf8fsAjXXvfeHYGmrMyYNtLSkAECgGM2p3AxHqaj53wFJA510AbtnyOGFMRzOeRmFDoRzVaAkWYFtG5FAJoV9A4oGlI2heMR8bCcmjeZMgvPzv_GzkLdWMCelRDWuYpIH0t7mHplvJrW-S52V05gpRTt8X_-UmxnTYt-cbNvILwgEmU7xPkb33gMnM7hsMvTyzZZ2aQ7Z_mjNP-Ar6mW--msJxYHoLqaJGqVtSOiB8Kt9exBPOYjGnacVOa94j3KRE6LuorZXeg==&c=q77HumDXx_PxdHtJcUQmAhHranPQmTbLZY04eaPU_pLXI6x4zPrMIg==&ch=bPppFmwC32AgKjP2UPJRxyq9XUjHVDtHIIqGXlOCJ1BqI-zrq1Urng==)

Friend,
---
Joe Biden's plans to end our oil and gas industry should deeply trouble every Texan -- and every American who values our nation's energy independence.
---
Not only is our energy sector a vital part of our economy, but countless Texas families rely on the industry to put food on the table and to receive dependable, affordable energy.
---
_As Texans, we must band together and fight back against Biden and the radical Left who have openly admitted they would kill the MILLIONS of Texas jobs in the oil and gas industry._
---
_With less than a week to go, this election truly is a battle for our nation 's prosperity._
---
[**Please rush an urgent contribution to keep Texas RED and save our state from Joe Biden and the radical Left 's disastrous, anti-energy agenda.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s7DQT7NxhnBwguCp9pGkXYNSkPHJfkQHrDUuWJDTijGwf8fsAjXXvfeHYGmrMyYNtLSkAECgGM2p3AxHqaj53wFJA510AbtnyOGFMRzOeRmFDoRzVaAkWYFtG5FAJoV9A4oGlI2heMR8bCcmjeZMgvPzv_GzkLdWMCelRDWuYpIH0t7mHplvJrW-S52V05gpRTt8X_-UmxnTYt-cbNvILwgEmU7xPkb33gMnM7hsMvTyzZZ2aQ7Z_mjNP-Ar6mW--msJxYHoLqaJGqVtSOiB8Kt9exBPOYjGnacVOa94j3KRE6LuorZXeg==&c=q77HumDXx_PxdHtJcUQmAhHranPQmTbLZY04eaPU_pLXI6x4zPrMIg==&ch=bPppFmwC32AgKjP2UPJRxyq9XUjHVDtHIIqGXlOCJ1BqI-zrq1Urng==)

#
I just got off the phone with my campaign manager and she told me that as of today, we are at 90% of our October fundraising goal. That is good news, but October ends in just 2 days.******So we need to pick up the pace.**

[Click here to help us get back on track.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=51543b30d8&e=140a9b81e7)

I am in this race because better representation is possible. I am running to unseat one of the House’s most anti-woman, anti-LGBTQ members. He sides with his super PAC donors and corporate special interests over the people of this district. That is why he voted to strip protections for preexisting conditions **54 times** while taking $300,000 from Big Pharma.

My opponent has the backing of the powerful and wealthy elite. **But I have refused that dirty super PAC money.** So I need your help.

[Can I count on you to chip in and help us pick up the pace so we can reach our October goal?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e1b2703bb9&e=140a9b81e7)

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Closing Time
body:
Peter,
There’s a simple quality that often separates those who are successful from those who aren’t.
The ability to close.
Getting 99% of the way towards a goal is impressive, but that final 1% is what really counts.
With just five days to go, that’s where we find ourselves.
**In our plan to mobilize one million Christian voters in 10 swing states, we’re short of our fundraising goals. Simply put, we must hit our final $250,000 goal before November 3.**
[**_So, in what will be my last email for My Faith Votes to you before Election Day, I ask you -- will you help us close the gap with an urgent donation to My Faith Votes right now?_**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201029apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201029apl01nd&n=1 "Donate Now")
If you need some motivation, think about what we witnessed Monday night, when Amy Coney Barrett was officially sworn in as the newest Associate Justice of the U.S. Supreme Court.
That was the third confirmation of an originalist justice to the bench. Unlike the activist judges of the progressive Left, they will safeguard the central role of God and faith in American life.
Just a few years ago, saying we could achieve this would be met with laughter. But here we are.
So remember -- the issues that matter to us as Christians do not have to be applause lines and empty promises on the campaign trail. They can drive the agenda, and they can become reality.
We just need to stay focused and stay organized.
My Faith Votes is the national leader in this fight and I couldn’t be more proud to serve as their Honorary National Chairman.
[**_So please, help us close with a donation of whatever you can. This is when it counts._**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201029apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201029apl01nd&n=2 "Donate Now")
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201029apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201029apl01nd&n=3)
Sincerely,
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201029apl01nd&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201029apl01nd&n=5).

Getting 99% of the way towards a goal is impressive, but that final 1% is what really counts. With just five days to go, that’s where we find ourselves. In our plan to mobilize one million Christian voters in 10 swing states, we’re short of our fundraising goals. Simply put, we must hit our final $250,000 goal before November 3. "Donate Now" If you need some motivation, think about what we witnessed Monday night, when Amy Coney Barrett was officially sworn in as the newest Associate Justice of the U.S. Supreme Court. That was the third confirmation of an originalist justice to the bench. Unlike the activist judges of the progressive Left, they will safeguard the central role of God and faith in American life. Just a few years ago, saying we could achieve this would be met with laughter. But here we are. So remember -- the issues that matter to us as Christians do not have to be applause lines and empty promises on the campaign trail. They can drive the agenda, and they can become reality. We just need to stay focused and stay organized. My Faith Votes is the national leader in this fight and I couldn’t be more proud to serve as their Honorary National Chairman. "Donate Now" Sincerely, Mike Huckabee Honorary National Chairman ©2020 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134

name: John Cornyn
subject: This CAN’T be happening
body:
Friend, When we began this race, I told you that I would come to you FIRST when things got tough.
I told you that I would be leaning on you for support if we hit a rough patch.
Well, Friend here we are.
I feel like I've broken a lot of bad news to you over the last few weeks, but this takes the cake.
As we speak, a group of liberal big tech billionaires are funneling a $28 million influx of dark money into my opponent's campaign.
With just 5 days to go, this couldn't have come at a WORSE time.
Friend, you know, they say that elections are won and lost in the eleventh hour. That's why I'm worried.
So I'm reaching out to you. Asking you to pull out all the stops.
**[I'm asking you to do anything you POSSIBLY can to help me keep pace with my opponent.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cgTNBBCKCmd-8t28BBf9G8-p0LAnIlFAJzwJJhyludyFLOeTE4D0rCozwaWy7ziFG1haJVtGGtLehiVNKmeOZYL5PD3kYujHranTMVZh0yxYD7oopVfbOdYfypkNR-wVUywIyyQTYWj6IpnR-e_GLe2C6yVRantPK_D3HNqkL3I6LAcCtXn9ySGzruVX6VMgLki75vbDRYQcji1S7uP3tGE324BEBZfXoLAtA8NNRaH0YS4lK4OJBbo7XcJ0vsQoNY6vMdGBHsfcTwnorCMH7A410DR_DpXFAhhLLjIeJjTq5z_dVmoIFL_pAo8-IhRTPTWEbRefCnC2VqpOnMGGPQYYboDT6ZV58HJQ7ZfPB8i5ykX6blpEpg==&c=LQXqUR7SGFSqSGc5HdEgGLwBrFYEuXMc0AmISK2sfxWtWb8YuO4x5g==&ch=F4i8pYNBY8kFLWaEu96ntImnNfKlrsl81i0q3PGsUv8eGG1ZKiydFg==)** [**STOP MJ HEGAR**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cgTNBBCKCmd-8t28BBf9G8-p0LAnIlFAJzwJJhyludyFLOeTE4D0rCozwaWy7ziFG1haJVtGGtLehiVNKmeOZYL5PD3kYujHranTMVZh0yxYD7oopVfbOdYfypkNR-wVUywIyyQTYWj6IpnR-e_GLe2C6yVRantPK_D3HNqkL3I6LAcCtXn9ySGzruVX6VMgLki75vbDRYQcji1S7uP3tGE324BEBZfXoLAtA8NNRaH0YS4lK4OJBbo7XcJ0vsQoNY6vMdGBHsfcTwnorCMH7A410DR_DpXFAhhLLjIeJjTq5z_dVmoIFL_pAo8-IhRTPTWEbRefCnC2VqpOnMGGPQYYboDT6ZV58HJQ7ZfPB8gjKFEGIVmZ0g==&c=LQXqUR7SGFSqSGc5HdEgGLwBrFYEuXMc0AmISK2sfxWtWb8YuO4x5g==&ch=F4i8pYNBY8kFLWaEu96ntImnNfKlrsl81i0q3PGsUv8eGG1ZKiydFg==) [**8X MATCH EMERGENCY DONATION**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cgTNBBCKCmd-8t28BBf9G8-p0LAnIlFAJzwJJhyludyFLOeTE4D0rCozwaWy7ziFG1haJVtGGtLehiVNKmeOZYL5PD3kYujHranTMVZh0yxYD7oopVfbOdYfypkNR-wVUywIyyQTYWj6IpnR-e_GLe2C6yVRantPK_D3HNqkL3I6LAcCtXn9ySGzruVX6VMgLki75vbDRYQcji1S7uP3tGE324BEBZfXoLAtA8NNRaH0YS4lK4OJBbo7XcJ0vsQoNY6vMdGBHsfcTwnorCMH7A410DR_DpXFAhhLLjIeJjTq5z_dVmoIFL_pAo8-IhRTPTWEbRefCnC2VqpOnMGGPQYYboDT6ZV58HJQ7ZfPB8hugGAfP8P6RA==&c=LQXqUR7SGFSqSGc5HdEgGLwBrFYEuXMc0AmISK2sfxWtWb8YuO4x5g==&ch=F4i8pYNBY8kFLWaEu96ntImnNfKlrsl81i0q3PGsUv8eGG1ZKiydFg==) Without your support, this could be the end.
Without your support, we could be handing MJ a free pass to install her liberal agenda in Texas.
**[Friend, TODAY is our chance to catch up, because frankly' we're running out of time.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cgTNBBCKCmd-8t28BBf9G8-p0LAnIlFAJzwJJhyludyFLOeTE4D0rCozwaWy7ziFG1haJVtGGtLehiVNKmeOZYL5PD3kYujHranTMVZh0yxYD7oopVfbOdYfypkNR-wVUywIyyQTYWj6IpnR-e_GLe2C6yVRantPK_D3HNqkL3I6LAcCtXn9ySGzruVX6VMgLki75vbDRYQcji1S7uP3tGE324BEBZfXoLAtA8NNRaH0YS4lK4OJBbo7XcJ0vsQoNY6vMdGBHsfcTwnorCMH7A410DR_DpXFAhhLLjIeJjTq5z_dVmoIFL_pAo8-IhRTPTWEbRefCnC2VqpOnMGGPQYYboDT6ZV58HJQ7ZfPB8gj5zUDSj6qSA==&c=LQXqUR7SGFSqSGc5HdEgGLwBrFYEuXMc0AmISK2sfxWtWb8YuO4x5g==&ch=F4i8pYNBY8kFLWaEu96ntImnNfKlrsl81i0q3PGsUv8eGG1ZKiydFg==)**
I need YOU to get off the sidelines and help me fight back in these final days.
John Cornyn Paid for by the Cornyn Majority Texas, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, and the Republican Party of Texas. Cornyn Majority Texas
228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER

The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.

The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Well, Friend here we are. I feel like I've broken a lot of bad news to you over the last few weeks, but this takes the cake. Friend, you know, they say that elections are won and lost in the eleventh hour. That's why I'm worried. So I'm reaching out to you. The Left is desperate to fill this seat with a socialist puppet. They're pulling out all the stops to buy this seat out from under us -- making our October fundraising deadline, the FINAL end of month fundraising deadline of this campaign, more important than ever.

Friend, frankly tomorrow is too late. Whether or not we reach our goal will determine whether or not we can expand our GOTV efforts when we need them most, run ads up until Election Day, and counter the hundreds of thousands of dollars the Far Left has spent attacking us.
[_**Chip in before Saturday 's FINAL end of month deadline to fight back against the Left's attacks >>>**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IN94gox31JwJl5OyiA_zhTS5Y_gazDhYL2hmzFp1MXfX_ki6wb4gAKyBYdT1k32cnh4iUrRl7RNDnkBSrezgVWk3NL0dasHky1Y_gZHc9FsSh7RO3HnXywaC4Drloch1HjPFfVlOFBiaUWGZn6V4kjs7B1Pejb688FLOm9oesg8k6zKQZlBMpn_5wN1AymEjmYzPFZyaZQ5hzer7Za5MX14dwqqZFGKFrEQ2WFo1Gq3ukT9vcuYD4HyH-SYmwATR-XRhGObfEXW-NdOLyfFNnY7D0HKUoMvanK6DaLc2t4OZc7MOWKVuLDRuPbSjd90niQ1nN5o40Mb9zGG4Z3V6oeuV3Ocj-f2OOLyl1ssDtEDzmJr7FIJwSwLCEpcezD7WiJeiy5vN0n5GUlXtimryDWsKL-VjA-Q8G0gjyvYS7ysmOVQ-4etnAw==&c=TsWqtte64wwp4djGl-G8JzCDC4lpIl92ZT-5jp2m7F1bi3vMHBraWw==&ch=AfFW4lIcncW0eN9hxN52cyVlevnpnTAwh78XcJUVMtzDsH2ptCyNMQ==)
To make matters worse, the DCCC just announced a heart-stopping $70,500,000.00 raised last quarter and made it clear where they're planning on spending that money to "reach deep in Trump territory"\-- _that means targeting every last conservative patriot fighting in this election, like me._

Urgency is an understatement. The most critical deadline our campaign has ever faced is just 2 days away and Election Day is only 3 days after that.

[**Can I count on you to fight?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IN94gox31JwJl5OyiA_zhTS5Y_gazDhYL2hmzFp1MXfX_ki6wb4gAKyBYdT1k32cnh4iUrRl7RNDnkBSrezgVWk3NL0dasHky1Y_gZHc9FsSh7RO3HnXywaC4Drloch1HjPFfVlOFBiaUWGZn6V4kjs7B1Pejb688FLOm9oesg8k6zKQZlBMpn_5wN1AymEjmYzPFZyaZQ5hzer7Za5MX14dwqqZFGKFrEQ2WFo1Gq3ukT9vcuYD4HyH-SYmwATR-XRhGObfEXW-NdOLyfFNnY7D0HKUoMvanK6DaLc2t4OZc7MOWKVuLDRuPbSjd90niQ1nN5o40Mb9zGG4Z3V6oeuV3Ocj-f2OOLyl1ssDtEDzmJr7FIJwSwLCEpcezD7WiJeiy5vN0n5GUlXtimryDWsKL-VjA-Q8G0gjyvYS7ysmOVQ-4etnAw==&c=TsWqtte64wwp4djGl-G8JzCDC4lpIl92ZT-5jp2m7F1bi3vMHBraWw==&ch=AfFW4lIcncW0eN9hxN52cyVlevnpnTAwh78XcJUVMtzDsH2ptCyNMQ==)

Fight together. Win together.

Jay

body:
If Joe Biden wins on Tuesday, there will be a rush for our border. It will be "olly olly oxen free" for illegal immigrants. Everyone knows Joe Biden and the radical Democrats aren't simply weak on immigration, they want to grant amnesty to millions of illegal immigrants, let in even more, and turn them all into Democrat voters.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XGqODj1UpKTtltKdX0dLQur2sDTXkVqoMi-PoK7K4LzqolIrXhIwT8-lJeB4isx7so19g7EeyggbcJFKcjwF6I6bSe-CKg7NJZkMvcm-Y23LxqpEZanGG19Dua6p1J-DYsDyfp4FL1X-h6KNcML8a4umUJzjiOvTT2HFbzltvNn3QgS4l68K0x9AsaR2I6Z_YPZLVr_Yim7kBRyQLiLlEsJXpBP6yrY8d3CsTw_4Vn0_ei7j8ynv9m9AHZpTRLqZ9Yioan2-4-Rjs6hjaE1ziDfy1s4tz6rn20NpJF6cwndkb1iFfQWOfOphFTJiB3brx2lCv7CQ9_Pbi5FHIb495g6_LlpoEdhxUEvCDpTwcbQCchCt2EVlhod0qUPIE8ichkl-QFcxISISj67r-vR6HJI6XWa6_jZCOkugXg9DsG3zewbBn-gJpA==&c=48RMsyhnsLjFZQBtnXb9qSaZVmBJCOd47tsVc-2jvYV5V1-AQZbtxw==&ch=llvTlvQzaL2vJ8KXV-WSIDSJMhPj8cTm0pl9KiFPd2xrIt3wwDv1ug==)

Friend,

**If Joe Biden wins on Tuesday, there will be a rush for our border.** It will be "olly olly oxen free" for illegal immigrants.

subject: My prediction: Senate Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
This is who you should watch on Election night

Hey Friend, it's Senator Tim Scott. I'm in between meetings but I couldn't go another hour without telling you this.
The race that will determine the Senate majority is the race in Maine. Susan, my friend and colleague, has been tied with her opponent for weeks. **There is more money being spent on political TV ads in Maine than Dallas, Chicago and Iowa City -- that 's an astronomical amount of money! **
YOU can save the Senate from Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders by keeping Susan working in Maine. name: Bruce, Team Warner Campaign Manager
subject: Getting to the finish line.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Your donation can help make Virginia blue all the way down the ballot.
|
---

| |
Derek --

You've been hearing from our team a lot about our voter mobilization efforts, and I'm writing today to let you know just how important it is that we turn out as many voters as possible in this election.

High turnout and strong support for Mark Warner's race doesn't just help this campaign -- we expect it'll help elect Joe Biden and boost down-ballot Virginia Democrats who are running in close races. And with so much at stake in this election, we're not willing to leave anything to chance.

**Your donation to our GOTV efforts will help re-elect Mark Warner,_and_ flip more districts in the Commonwealth. [Can we count on you?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9e9/53d9897e/55657d44/1c88c80e/747558912/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-alltheway?refcode=20201029_f_1_d__920__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Let me break it down: When Senator Tim Kaine won re-election in 2018, he won seven out of VA's 11 congressional districts. Democratic congressional candidates _also_ won in those seven districts, but they _fell short_ in the districts that Senator Kaine lost.

I expect this same pattern to repeat itself in the 2020 election. If Mark wins his race by a large enough margin, he can help boost down-ballot candidates in their own races, which is especially important in toss-up districts like VA-05, where Dr. Cameron Webb faces an extreme GOP opponent.

Our goal is simple: we're doing everything in our power to help Mark win his race, **_so down-ballot Democrats will also win their competitive races._**

**[Will you help us in this final stretch and make sure we send Mark Warner back to the Senate?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9e9/53d9897e/55657d44/1c88c80d/747558912/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-alltheway?refcode=20201029_f_1_d__920__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for all of your support!

-- Team Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9e9/53d9897e/55657d44/1c88c80c/747558912/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-alltheway?refcode=20201029_f_1_d__920__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Bill Olson
subject: I am going to win for Trump and me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iTOiztQ5iF6OuRU&b=IbmKVFLBgNwT29DOLXcX.Q

Hi Peter,

I'm about to prove that a Trump conservative can win in Florida- but I need your help to do it!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative veteran and fighter who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iTOiztQ5iF6OuRU&b=IbmKVFLBgNwT29DOLXcX.Q
!

I'll cut right to the point- our race is tied. A dead heat.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iTOiztQ5iF6OuRU&b=IbmKVFLBgNwT29DOLXcX.Q

A recent local analysis of the race reveals why it's closing:

“The fact is, I’m a progressive,” Soto said. "I am passionate about progressive issues."

Olson said, “This is not personal, but Congressman Soto can be the nicest guy in the world but it doesn’t matter because he doesn’t vote the way I believe people here in Central Florida believe,” Olson said. “He voted with Nancy Pelosi, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, AOC (Ocasio-Cortez), 93% of the time, and I don’t believe that ‘the Squad,’ that the people of Central Florida have that philosophy.”

Soto said his alignment with Pelosi on most House votes reflects his support for an agenda that includes raising wages, expanding access to health care and preserving the environment.

As of Wednesday, Soto had reported about $744,000 in campaign contributions, with about 71% of that coming from political committees. Those contributors include the American Bankers Association, the League of Conservation Voters and Abbott Laboratories.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iTOiztQ5iF6OuRU&b=IbmKVFLBgNwT29DOLXcX.Q

This race will revolve around turnout- it's that simple. If we turn out Trump/Olson voters, we will win. If we do not, we will lose.

We have worked hard, and this race is closing fast! People don't want a Pelosi clone who votes with the Squad and is bought off by Swamp lobbyists!

They want a normal guy, a veteran, who has been getting things done for our country for decades!

We have one week. It's all about turnout here. Join my 4,000 patriots who want to drain the Swamp! I need your help to beat Soto and Pelosi!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iTOiztQ5iF6OuRU&b=IbmKVFLBgNwT29DOLXcX.Q

Trump is fighting for Florida, just as I'm fighting for my swing district. Helping me helps him- and we need the help right now!

My district is critical. Trump is overperforming among Hispanic voters. If we win here, we win Florida. This is it!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST Pelosi and the Swamp!

As of Wednesday, Soto had reported about $744,000 in campaign contributions, with about 71% of that coming from political committees. After watching her single mother and small business owner fall prey to unfair taxes, Michelle knew she needed to fight for what's right.

Since then she's returned over $400 million to California taxpayers, fought back against Sanctuary State legislation, and continued to support local law enforcement in the face of calls to defund it.

_**With the odds stacked against her, Michelle continues to deliver real results. In Congress, she 'll continue to do just that. But she needs our help to get there first...**_

clean_body: We're at a critical moment in America, %%First Name%%. We're 5 days away from the final battle over the very soul of our nation. The Democrats are on the attack and they aren't letting up any time soon . == We're at a critical moment in America, Friend. We're 5 days away from the final battle over the very soul of our nation. The Democrats are on the attack and they aren't letting up any time soon: Nothing would make Pelosi happier than shutting conservative voices out of California for good. And she 's lined up millions to do it. Her PAC alone is spending $5.7 million to defeat us and they're spending more dark money attacking us than they're spending against anyone else in the nation. We need to fight back. We need conservatives like you to take a stand and fight for the House Majority. In a race as competitive as this one --right now it 's a toss-up and a top-target \-- your support could mean the difference between victory and defeat. == Victory on Election Day hinges on our ability to reach our goal and fight back against the Left's attacks. | | == ** | | == | == | | == Michelle came to America in search of opportunity with the hope of a better future. Instead, she found a broken political system that was victimizing the very people it was built to serve. After watching her single mother and small business owner fall prey to unfair taxes, Michelle knew she needed to fight for what's right. Since then she's returned over $400 million to California taxpayers, fought back against Sanctuary State legislation, and continued to support local law enforcement in the face of calls to defund it. With the odds stacked against her, Michelle continues to deliver real results. In Congress, she 'll continue to do just that. But she needs our help to get there first... | == | | == | == | | == As an immigrant and proud conservative, Michelle knows first-hand the troubles and trials of running for office under scrutiny, constantly subjected to the Left's attacks. That's why, today, we're asking you to help elect a woman and an immigrant--not because she is those things but because she's the best person for the job. == Our FINAL end of month deadline is Saturday -- that's just 48 hours away. Just 5 days before Election Day, reaching our goal has never been more important. The fate of the House Majority rests on this seat. Thank you, Team Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. ==** Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress 8907 Warner Ave Suite 222 Huntington Beach, CA 92647 == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Tim Scott
subject: "That one in the Senate"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I'll be honest. I am used to reading insults and name calling from folks on social media. But, when it comes from a prominent Congressman in my home state of South Carolina--it takes on a whole new meaning. Take a look for yourself at what Congressman Jim Clyburn said about me, on the record, in a recent interview.
Friend,

I'll be honest. I am used to reading insults and name calling from folks on social media. But, when it comes from a prominent Congressman in my home state of South Carolina--it takes on a whole new meaning.

Take a look for yourself at what Congressman Jim Clyburn said about me, on the record, in a recent interview.
**"If you really want to be honest about it, that one in the Senate ...sounds like tokenism," Clyburn said.**
_" That one in the Senate?"_

Excuse me Congressman Clyburn, I have a name. It is Tim Scott, and I am a proud Black conservative who is blessed to represent the great people of South Carolina in the United States Senate.

[**Can you help me ensure that every Democrat knows my name and knows that I am a proud Black Republican?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/use-my-name/?utm_campaign=20201029_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1038983-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201029_that-one-in-the-senate)

---
Democrats cannot stand that I am a proud, Black Republican. They cannot stand that my family went from cotton to Congress in one lifetime.

You see, my story doesn't fit their narrative. So instead of debating the issues, they turn to casual racism and name calling.

Friend, I have grown accustomed to these types of insults and frankly it only makes me more determined than ever to fight for our conservative values.

[**Can you help me ensure that every Democrat knows my name and knows that I am a proud Black Republican?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/use-my-name/?utm_campaign=20201029_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1038983-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201029_that-one-in-the-senate)

As a bold, common-sense conservative, we cannot afford to lose David in the Senate. **_We 're asking every patriot to stand up RIGHT NOW to help David gain the support he needs to fight back against the radical Left and secure a Republican win in Georgia._**

In these **FINAL DAYS** leading up to Election Day, there has never been a more important time for Republicans to act than right now. Vital seats are in jeopardy of being lost to the radical far-Left, and David Perdue's seat in Georgia is _in serious trouble._

Our America First agenda has made too much progress to allow the Democrats to undo the years of conservative successes we've accomplished under President Trump's leadership. Allowing Chuck Schumer's handpicked liberal candidate, Jon Ossoff, to gain control would be a disaster for both Georgia and America. body:
Jerry’s counting on you now more than ever.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/1a4e7679c8ddc2d2/ace9fefa650606b9c3d6b838967d376c/32613) Fellow Conservative, You’re likely getting a lot of political emails this week. We’ll keep this one short and get right to the point. With FIVE DAYS until Election Day, we're facing the most important -- and LAST -- End-of- Month fundraising deadline of our campaign. And I hate to say it, but things are not looking good, %%first name%%.
**With FIVE DAYS until Election Day, we 're facing the most important -- and LAST -- End-of- Month fundraising deadline of our campaign.**

And I hate to say it, but things are not looking good, Friend.

We could just throw in the towel and quit on one of the most ambitious grassroots fundraising goals any Senate race has seen this cycle.

But I have never given up on a fight in my entire life - not even while serving our nation overseas or here at home fighting for Iowa in the U.S. Senate - and I REFUSE to start now.
**We have a major deficit to make up, Friend, I won 't lie to you. With just 2 days until our FINAL end-of-month fundraising deadline, we are still $153,192 short of our goal.**

name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: Why I’m supporting Abigail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/FAMajwcTjrb3rBvUN24KiU8iMwg5RiUhxGZqaFNd2Jw=/SKEhWR5nzfehuXfG0ppswhmHHd0SL-qvCcZoTYVyzBw=)
---
| Peter, At this critical moment for our country, our nation needs leaders who bring the American people together. We need leaders who can build bridges, find common ground, and represent everyone - no matter who they voted for - with integrity. [**Abigail Spanberger has the proven record of this kind of leadership, and we urgently need to keep her voice in Congress. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/FAMajwcTjrb3rBvUN24KiU8iMwg5RiUhxGZqaFNd2Jw=/SKEhWR5nzfehuXfG0ppswhmHHd0SL-qvCcZoTYVyzBw=) [_**With just 5 days left until Election Day, I 'm personally reaching out to ask you to join me in supporting Abigail's re-election and please contribute to her campaign.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/FAMajwcTjrb3rBvUN24KiU8iMwg5RiUhxGZqaFNd2Jw=/SKEhWR5nzfehuXfG0ppswhmHHd0SL-qvCcZoTYVyzBw=) The candidates who inspire me most, like Abigail, have a true belief in public service. They exhibit empathy, dedication, and a spirit of service in all they do. In Congress, Abigail puts the needs of Central Virginians first, working to lower prescription drug costs, expand rural broadband internet access, and support small businesses struggling in the face of this recession. She works hard to be an accessible leader, hosting town halls and listening sessions so she can hear directly from all of her constituents. [**But Abigail is running against a hyper-partisan extremist who has voted time and time again against the needs of Central Virginia families. And super PACs have flooded Virginia 's airwaves attacking Abigail's character and record of service.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/FAMajwcTjrb3rBvUN24KiU8iMwg5RiUhxGZqaFNd2Jw=/SKEhWR5nzfehuXfG0ppswhmHHd0SL-qvCcZoTYVyzBw=) The stakes for Central Virginians are too high not to do everything we can in this final stretch of the campaign. After this is over, I want us to look back and say that we all came together like never before to elect strong, inspiring public servants who represent our values. [_**So that 's why I'm asking one last time: will you please contribute to Abigail's re-election campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/FAMajwcTjrb3rBvUN24KiU8iMwg5RiUhxGZqaFNd2Jw=/SKEhWR5nzfehuXfG0ppswhmHHd0SL-qvCcZoTYVyzBw=)
---

Mayor Pete

Friend,

We just released the final ad of Gov. Holcomb’s re-election campaign, and it’s a must-watch.

body:

---
| |
---
| | Hello, #TeamDani!

Wow. Only 5 days to go until Election Day, can you believe it?

Over 100,000 voters in IL-16 have cast their votes already but we are still expecting nearly 200,000 more votes between now and Election Day, **making these 5 days the most critical stretch of the campaign.**

We need to make sure we reach out to every Democratic voter who has not voted yet so that they get to the polls to vote for Joe Biden, Dani, and Democrats up and down the ballot. [Sign up here to make calls to Democratic voters so they remember to vote!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=964cbcc900&e=140a9b81e7)

Getting out the Democratic vote during this last stretch is the key to our victory, and we need your help to get it done. So sign up for a shift or two or three and help propel us to victory next Tuesday!

Team Dani

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariannette=20=28personal=29?=
subject: I'll be quick
body:
| | | | Friends,

I'll be quick. I just left Washington county and am on the road to Henry county for the 7th day of our 24 county tour (don't worry I am in the passenger seat). I just wanted to reach out to tell you how important this election is.

This election is about the future of our country. If elected, the democrats will be complicit in lawlessness, they will overturn the Trump tax cuts that have benefited thousands of middle-class and low-income families here in Iowa and they will pass legislation that will hand control of Iowa farms over to D.C. bureaucrats.

We must stop them. We are running a campaign of law and order, and economic prosperity for all Iowans. [Will you chip in $25 to secure this victory on November 3rd?](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=b5e67efda6&e=16fac31a0f) I'm counting on you!
Thank you for your support!

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

Sent via iPhone
