name: Paul Junge
subject: You're invited
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Junge for Congress
body:
I will be hosting a Virtual Discussion with special guest the Honorable Peter Navarro.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OZ6vNPZlMl_GnbDUrzz6-E6y-EZiP69QvIdZ4VVZ57yfc94I96omaTqKfoPw2NLKtjmyQu2rYWUsj69p4Fd-3tdhzSbwqQ0VXH1fY-YwohwEfP242fn1R138a5ppngQCJWe9l0RcGMwtJZGeG9QzYimpcc6lH0-o2frDNl9d7ISTCBlS-A-ZfI9L_y-lZn_bYjPv93cy9iVxTMtvq2ndxDq1h2eHNiUpCCmRQTDlbNgI9GoVeTdDttaJTTln95nR6ov8WFyKK60DlfmmYQIwv3_cJSdRjiQq4c5Jer1_LenxT-WgBQOTX0Y27M9DxLfRu2l63mytZvE_l7JjRcsDwpI6XYrJQEGAuiZIBEdKa0hWHXKC5QBiH_pexnTdGSIL&c=zMnIJswL6Yh_bwMA1TrlIdGCo20tMZVpPTo6wVyZK93cRwkc17AT_Q==&ch=kEd2dd09h6HTx86ulngR8bjXbinEwRQUFlOgNwxT9MERPWeE4tjTaw==)

Friend,
**I will be hosting a Virtual Discussion with special guest the Honorable Peter Navarro. **
This virtual meeting will take place on Friday, October 30th starting at 5:00 PM. You can join by calling **810-705-2120** or emailing **pauljungeforcongress@gmail.com** to RSVP.

As we enter the final days of the most important election of our lifetime, it remains an extremely tight race and my opponent continues to receive dollars from Nancy Pelosi's dark money war in an effort to defeat me.

_My opponent Elissa Slotkin has received endorsements from every far-left D.C. elitists including Joe Biden, Hillary Clinton, and even former President Barack Obama._ As you know, wherever their endorsements go, dark money donors follow. They have put a target on my back because they know I can flip this seat back to the conservative Republican side.

Unlike Elissa Slotkin, I will be an ally to the President and work with him to lower drug prices, bring manufacturing back to Michigan, hold China accountable and implement America First trade policies to benefit all the constituents of our great state. **We will start getting real results for Michiganders, not Socialist legislative proposals that die in the Senate.**

Friend, I know you can agree that we need to continue building jobs and help Michigan continue to recover from the pandemic. **Please RSVP to the virtual discussion before 12:00PM Friday.** I appreciate your continued support and look forward to discussing the future of Michigan with you.

Onward to Victory,

Paul Junge

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New OpEd: The liberal religious revival is growing and Godless
body:
[ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=fdb915d1c8bc476597c09cda9ce1c9d1&_e=IgXunk2ouyF1TB4BBW7IOeSyRSqDE__haxlGmypZprBOjpp-waKOER6KH_4OezLkK-bQQRAOKIpjS9l8AlcT6E9zorSHAWySmrXvNxmLNye71nIdzxqHgH_wN0LJdJSae12FKkmB6whjj6ZI0_gT8ZwCGVc0RLUPYwY_jzCQ_JRGrjG7gDraPXiLYCXNvKI6gjeSI5pKsqWTApKcbNMWY-NshbRQEcN9ouhCOVBEEYZtCbBKK0JiajJ5OVqS0j6r1HDdk5h56W95bnIRaNBkBA%3D%3D) I hope you get a chance to read my latest article in the Washington Examiner, "[The liberal religious revival is growing and Godless](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=fdb915d1c8bc476597c09cda9ce1c9d1&_e=IgXunk2ouyF1TB4BBW7IObB6X1dUPoR371D3KgeAkdSMKrAeNvWQVHXfR6BDlldMJVeyI7JytRd7nFKAgdroQ8sKQdFFMMDXFNxnvzSHigenFF8jtYFQMWFzzmB0NPuSGQwLx0He19S_g-J3Pj3g2KS539zfT8iQpBXVPtuL4Lbv97QfzojY3Kq8QXbANxvxWo7HaO9wZrm2OdTVQEPEW0Fu0ur_5RtkdSD2b8H02LW609h1bb68o31px4NsUA-HSDKINVM8jmgvUbv66Wrs48PlgDcgJu1eut-8eOcfm0dpLZwvj__Ulgt67qCXlsbUr5AG3ULEO7p6DVY4So6U9z6RpUec5gmWTX06BID0G7k%3D)." Liberals approach issues such as global warming, racial and gender grievances, and income inequality with a religious absolutism that does not easily allow for compromise or even recognition of progress. Sincerely, Bobby Jindal [CLICK HERE TO READ FULL ARTICLE](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=fdb915d1c8bc476597c09cda9ce1c9d1&_e=IgXunk2ouyF1TB4BBW7IObB6X1dUPoR371D3KgeAkdSMKrAeNvWQVHXfR6BDlldMJVeyI7JytRd7nFKAgdroQ8sKQdFFMMDXFNxnvzSHigenFF8jtYFQMWFzzmB0NPuSGQwLx0He19S_g-J3Pj3g2Jd2TUymvBX3qjAz0OhGxov-buPZEW5U5wzBebKHSKscGElcgDt_11lrBbaxDvVtD50MF2DbOFt22mkbG0c24dOEQK4mPcjyt20mjl4VGbbQKmQWEPsqbkMx99ZibmlddQv_geWWM4oD9ZOpaS9Q4zsX5-SNF1qqb8LjxkU82oo4rHZ64fwRoHzGY9OioilOv1NMTmbmb-tDJqGCHG546Sg%3D) Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320 [Click here to unsubscribe.](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=fdb915d1c8bc476597c09cda9ce1c9d1&_t=SxMre0sIBCedOjf1HxEFBZj4GUQX9hs2SScZLdIUUE1a5TJyHeTOTR-hegOvuq975i3oNitH_0ElWkXn1mC8Hg7qbBGXi0SHhvas5mA-fsSezveLJaWDsh-3EHc1uvLEc47mAirNLnMGBfO10FbFwdMhvlyk1-nLGPFCGSQ_Z9w%3D)

subject: ICYMI: Sioux City Journal endorses Randy Feenstra
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| In case you didn’t get the chance to see it, I’m writing today to highlight the Sioux City Journal’s endorsement of my friend Randy Feenstra!
[Read the full article here!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=182c75e20a&e=d48ad6f8f4)
This is a hard-earned endorsement, and one that carries significant weight, but comes as no surprise to those of us that have had the chance to work with Randy. In the Iowa Senate, Randy showed up to work hard and deliver results for Iowans, and he did by cutting taxes, protecting unborn life, promoting Iowa agriculture, defending the Second Amendment, and helping me to balance the state budget.

Randy is proven, effective, and determined to deliver results for Iowa and America. With your support, he’ll make a fantastic Representative for the Fourth District. Make sure you get out to vote, and consider chipping in a few dollars to help his campaign reach out to undecided voters!

---

Governor Kim Reynolds

body:
Today marks FIVE days out from the election and mere HOURS away from our October fundraising deadline. Our ask is simple: can you chip in just $5?

****
****

Today marks FIVE days out from the election and mere HOURS away from our October fundraising deadline.

Our ask is simple: _**can you chip in just $5?**_

**Just $5 can go a long way in helping to hold the line in our Republican Senate Majority. The Republican Senate is the LAST line of defense against progressives like AOC, Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren from imposing their radical agenda.**

The Left is FUMING at all of the progress we've made under Republican leadership, and they're plotting their revenge: they've pledged to "transition" away from the oil and gas industry, pack the Supreme Court with liberal judges, eliminate the filibuster, implement tax hikes, adopt Medicare-for-All, open up our borders and defund law enforcement... And they're just getting started.

Your Republican Senate Majority is fighting for you, but they can't do it alone. _Democrats have been outraising and outspending Republicans in CRITICAL battleground states. It 's time to show up for Republicans and shift the momentum in our favor._

**Chip in just $5 before 11:59 on October 31 to give Senate Republicans a boost before Election Day!**

Friend,

We are coming down to the wire and need your help to break the statistical tie in our race. We can only do that by focusing all of our efforts on getting out the vote.

That’s why I’m emailing you right now. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to provide the resources our campaign needs to ensure we turn out likely supporters of our campaign who haven’t yet cast their vote in this critical election.

**We’ve set a goal to raise $25,000 in the final days of the campaign to fund our Get Out the Vote efforts, which will not only help our campaign flip this Congressional District from red to blue, it will help Joe Biden carry Florida and win the White House.**

**[Listen, we need all hands on deck in the remaining days of this campaign, if we are going to win. name: Warren Democrats
subject: We want to explain why your contribution would be so important right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
We have big plans for the final days: reaching out to 1 million voters before November 3. But we can only carry out those plans with the support of our strongest grassroots supporters like you | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525107/45c30650/1c7e345ef/66eb554d/2515359258/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

In a moment, we're going to ask if you can make a contribution to Warren Democrats. But first, we want to explain why your contribution would be so important right now.

There are only 5 days until Election Day, and millions of people across the country have already cast their ballots. Everything is on the line: Taking back control of the White House, regaining a majority in the Senate, and fighting for real relief for families from this pandemic and economic crisis.

We can't leave anything up to chance. That's why this team is fighting each and every day to help organize in races across the country, fundraise for down-ballot Democrats, and volunteer for campaigns that can use an extra push.

We have big plans for the final days: reaching out to 1 million voters before November 3. But we can only carry out those plans with the support of our strongest grassroots supporters like you -- and we're so grateful to have you on this team.

**[If you can, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to power our work in the final stretch of the election, help take back the Senate, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525107/45c30650/1c7e345ef/66eb554c/2515359258/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMThGX0VPTV9HT0xfQ18yMDIwMTAyOV9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW18F_EOM_GOL_C_20201029_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Join Wesley For Our Final Super Saturday and GOTV Rally with Congressman McCaul!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

We are officially in the home stretch to Election Day, and your engagement with our campaign has never been more important! We are on the cusp of bringing new leadership to the 7th District and we need your help to get across the finish line.

In the final approach to November 3rd we hope you will _**join us for our final Super Saturday of 2020 and our Get Out The Vote (GOTV) Rally with Congressman Michael McCaul**_!

**_Start your weekend with Wesley at our Team Hunt block walk on Saturday morning at 10:00am_.** In the past two months, we have knocked over 100,000 doors and we are confident this kind of outreach is what will make the difference in November. Help us finish strong and reach as many friends and neighbors in the 7th District as possible!

Then, the evening before Election Day, _**join Wesley and Congressman Michael McCaul for our final Get Out The Vote Rally**_! Exercising your right to vote is a sacred duty Wesley and his West Point classmates put their lives on the line to defend. We hope you will join us on Monday as we rally the 7th District to go to the polls and vote on Election Day!

If you plan to participate in these events, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com.

We hope to see you there!

Thank you,
Team Hunt

clean_body: Friend, We are officially in the home stretch to Election Day, and your engagement with our campaign has never been more important! We are on the cusp of bringing new leadership to the 7th District and we need your help to get across the finish line. In the final approach to November 3rd we hope you will join us for our final Super Saturday of 2020 and our Get Out The Vote (GOTV) Rally with Congressman Michael McCaul! Start your weekend with Wesley at our Team Hunt block walk on Saturday morning at 10:00am. In the past two months, we have knocked over 100,000 doors and we are confident this kind of outreach is what will make the difference in November. Help us finish strong and reach as many friends and neighbors in the 7th District as possible! Then, the evening before Election Day, join Wesley and Congressman Michael McCaul for our final Get Out The Vote Rally! Exercising your right to vote is a sacred duty Wesley and his West Point classmates put their lives on the line to defend. We hope you will join us on Monday as we rally the 7th District to go to the polls and vote on Election Day! If you plan to participate in these events, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com. We hope to see you there! Thank you, Team Hunt **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

clean_body: These patriots deserve it | Friend, In these last few days before election day, our amazing team of volunteers have been spending all day knocking on doors, making phone calls, and rallying support for our pro-Trump movement. We’re so grateful to these patriots who have sacrificed countless days, hours, and weeks to ensure we can put America on the right path and fight the radical Left. We want to thank our volunteers for all of their hard work to drain the Swamp, and I was hoping you could help us out. The people who have given up their precious time and energy to volunteer have been the lifeblood of our movement, Friend. Without them, we never would have gotten as far as we have today in our fight for America’s future. In these final 5 days until election day, they’ll be working harder than ever to bring this race home, and I hope we can show them just how grateful we are for all their sacrifices. Thank you, Rep. Byron Donalds Official Republican Nominee for Congress Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress. 2430 Vanderbilt Beach Road, Ste 108 PMB 260, Naples, FL 34108

name: Rob Portman
subject: I’m being attacked.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
My staff just forwarded a concerning article to me... A group of radical progressives has launched a massive fundraising operation to unseat me. I k Peter, My staff just forwarded a concerning article to me...
A group of radical progressives has launched a massive fundraising operation to unseat me.
I knew I had to email you first for help.
They’re using my support of the newest Supreme Court justice – a brilliant legal scholar and defender of the Constitution – to rally their left-wing troops against me.
They want to replace our nation’s respect and reverence for our founding documents with an angry, progressive band of activist judges on our Court.
...And they want to start by unseating me!
Peter, I’m concerned by how early they’re starting... If effective, they could do some serious damage. **[I need you to help counter their efforts now. name: Molly Keenan, JayInslee.com
subject: On COVID and gun violence prevention:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is why this should matter to everyone everywhere.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8209%2E868730%2EslPnkT) Friend, We've seen just how important governors are this year when it comes to protecting not only their citizens but the citizens of neighboring states. Jay's worked hard to keep Washingtonians healthy, while prioritizing employment opportunities as well as our access to Washington's beautiful outdoor spaces. He's also continued to fight for progress on health care, economic growth, and more -- that's why he and Loren Culp couldn't be more different. **Electing Loren Culp in Washington state would be akin to electing Donald Trump as our governor -- and it's a decision that affects more than just Washington. That's why this election matters so much:[We set a $75,000 goal to finish this election strong. Will you chip in $5 or more before our FINAL fundraising deadline on Halloween?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13462?t=4&akid=8209%2E868730%2EslPnkT)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13463?t=5&akid=8209%2E868730%2EslPnkT)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13464?t=6&akid=8209%2E868730%2EslPnkT)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13465?t=7&akid=8209%2E868730%2EslPnkT)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13466?t=8&akid=8209%2E868730%2EslPnkT)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13467?t=9&akid=8209%2E868730%2EslPnkT)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13462?t=10&akid=8209%2E868730%2EslPnkT)
---
Here's how far apart Loren Culp and Jay are on two of the big issues affecting _all_ of us:
On COVID-19:
* Jay has issued public health proclamations that put the health and welfare of Washingtonians first. Those science-based decisions have saved lives.
* Loren Culp said, "It's not the governor's job to dictate to us what to do in our businesses or our lives." He's held huge in-person rallies and still scoffs at wearing a mask.

And on gun violence prevention:
* Jay's championed laws that keep families safe, including Initiative 1639 that bans the sale of semiautomatic weapons to people under 21 and puts enhanced background checks in place for everyone buying firearms.
* Loren Culp compares the police officers who enforce that law to Nazis and compares himself to Rosa Parks for refusing to enforce it himself as a sheriff.

There are countless more differences between these two candidates, and each of these topics affects more than just our state. With Jay, we know we have a proven leader who makes strong, decisive choices to keep folks safe. With Loren Culp, well, you know you get a mini-Donald Trump who puts himself first.
**This is why we have to elect Jay this fall and why we will fight for every last vote to do it: Our FINAL fundraising deadline is on Saturday.[Will you donate $5 or more to help raise $75,000 before midnight on Halloween?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13462?t=11&akid=8209%2E868730%2EslPnkT)**
Thanks,
Molly
Molly Keenan
Campaign Manager
Inslee for Washington
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13462?t=12&akid=8209%2E868730%2EslPnkT)
---

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Wow, y'all.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Election Day is just five days away!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891dfc/7f51f7bc/59118008/4efb24f7/1931500426/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Wow, Peter --

The day we've all been waiting for is almost here -- **Election Day is just five days away** , and tomorrow is the last day to vote early. We're using every second we have left to reach as many voters as possible and make sure they turn out to vote before it's too late.

**[If you're able to help, please pitch in here to keep powering our campaign through Election Day.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891dfc/7f51f7bc/59118008/4efb24f6/1931500426/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201029.2nd__2429__&amount=10")**

A recent poll showed us just one point behind Sen. Cornyn, so we can absolutely win this race. But he's not giving up easily: Sen. Cornyn and his special interest funders are spending MILLIONS on misleading ads all over the state, trying to scare voters into re-electing him.

I'm no stranger to a hard fight, but it's going to take all of us doing what we can to win this one. Unlike Sen. Cornyn, we don't have corporate PACs boosting us in these final few days -- we have a grassroots movement powered by hundreds of thousands of people like you.

**All donations in these final few days go directly toward reaching voters and making sure they cast their ballots. If you 're able, please pitch in whatever amount you can to help us WIN on November 3rd.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891dfc/7f51f7bc/59118008/4efb24f5/1931500426/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201029.2nd__2429__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891dfc/7f51f7bc/59118008/4efb24f4/1931500426/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201029.2nd__2429__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891dfc/7f51f7bc/59118008/4efb24eb/1931500426/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201029.2nd__2429__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891dfc/7f51f7bc/59118008/4efb24ea/1931500426/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201029.2nd__2429__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891dfc/7f51f7bc/59118008/4efb24e9/1931500426/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201029.2nd__2429__")**
Let's do this.

\-- MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891dfc/7f51f7bc/59118008/4efb24f6/1931500426/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201029.2nd__2429__&amount=10")

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891dfc/7f51f7bc/59118008/4efb24e8/1931500426/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2429&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891dfc/7f51f7bc/59118008/4efb24ef/1931500426/VEsHBQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Freitas Alerts
subject: Who will stand for Virginia?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:
Friend, **In 5 days,** voters will choose who to represent the Commonwealth: strong conservative Nick Freitas or radical Democrat Abigail Spanberger. subject: The Great American Recovery: Third Quarter GDP Blows Past Expectations
body:
U.S. GDP grew 7.4 percent (33.1 percent at an annual rate) in the third quarter, the largest single quarter of economic growth on record | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1ad7b2aa74&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Great American Recovery: Third Quarter GDP Blows Past Expectations**

“After releasing his plan to reopen America safely in April, President Trump remarked that prior to the Coronavirus pandemic, the United States had ‘built the greatest economy anywhere in the world . . . and we’re going to build it again,’” the White House Council of Economic Advisers writes.

“This morning’s release of U.S. GDP for the third quarter of 2020 from the Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) affirms President Trump’s statement . . . GDP grew 7.4 percent (33.1 percent at an annual rate) in the third quarter, the largest single quarter of economic growth on record and roughly twice the prior record of 3.9 percent.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d60cc8ec05&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “However implemented, the public option, like its close cousin Medicare-for All, poses a grave threat to America’s beleaguered health care workers,” writes Seema Verma, administrator of the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services. “In light of the pandemic, that’s the last thing health care workers need . . . America owes them a debt of gratitude–not a pay cut.” Read more in [_RealClearHealth_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05bc7f1d44&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Under the Trump administration, our country’s air is the cleanest ever recorded, our water has never been safer to drink, and we lead the world in overall GHG-emissions reductions . . . When it comes to intelligent environmental regulation, instead of blaming the Trump administration for their problems, perhaps [California] should look to it for guidance,” EPA Administrator Andrew Wheeler writes in [_National Review_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=956724e1c5&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Last week, President Trump announced his promise to Indian Country–a collaborative policy agenda titled ‘Putting America’s First Peoples First: Forgotten No More.’ The plan reflects the President’s commitment to partnering with Native American communities to build a brighter future, while at the same time honoring their past,” write Acting Domestic Policy Council Director Brooke Rollins and Assistant Interior Secretary of Indian Affairs Tara Sweeney in [_Indian Country Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=afd8554795&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=36762e5db3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2611d04e68&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=eedd35fe5f)

| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

Just 5 days from the election, Facebook pulled my ads from the platform —without notification — just hours after Mark Zuckerberg appeared in front of a Senate committee that discussed this very issue!

| Dear Friends, Today, I wrote an op-ed that details why it is so important for Republicans to re-take the majority in the Senate. _Here are a few excerpts:_ “The Democrats running for state Senate do not share our view of the New Hampshire Advantage. Republicans know that the key to our success is **lower taxes, fewer regulations, more freedom and more trust in you.** The Democrats’ approach is always the same — higher taxes, more regulation and more left-wing policies inspired by Nancy Pelosi, Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders."
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTQyODI1OTEzMTA2ODMwNjE0JmM9ajBmMyZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDE5OTY1OTgmZD1rMHI2eTV6.ggW_ryRM8sZBja6eGewo3bDAMIHcqYVekYyjpjibd70)

| "They will not be satisfied until they get a broad-based tax to feed their insatiable desire for ever-increasing government spending. Your Republican state senators are an essential firewall against this tried and true Democrat approach to **tapping your wallet again and again** , every time another new liberal idea comes to mind. Your vote for a Republican state Senate candidate means more growth, more freedom, and **no income tax — never an income tax — period.”** If you can help us, please donate now. We are fighting for you and for our Granite State.

My predictions for the 2020 Electoral Map...

https://youtu.be/rAMQtFnC_Lk?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=66143d4e83-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_10_29_04_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-66143d4e83-68212193
It takes 270 electoral votes to win the presidency, in 2016 Donald Trump got to 306, can he do it again? Check out my video on my YouTube page to see how I filled in the RealClearPolitics map and let me know if you agree.

Subscribe to my YouTube Channel (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=66143d4e83-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_10_29_04_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-66143d4e83-68212193)
How Third-Party Candidates Could Determine the Presidency (https://www.realclearpolitics.com/articles/2020/10/28/how_third_party_candidates_could_determine_the_presidency_.html?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=66143d4e83-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_10_29_04_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-66143d4e83-68212193)

In 2016 third-party candidates played a big role in determining the president, will they this time? My latest op-ed in RealClearPolitics explains why certain candidates like Kanye West, Jo Jorgerson and Howie Hawkins may be the most important names on the ballot. Read it here. (https://www.realclearpolitics.com/articles/2020/10/28/how_third_party_candidates_could_determine_the_presidency_.html?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=66143d4e83-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_10_29_04_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-66143d4e83-68212193)
Leading America hit bookshelves last week, so I've got a deal just for all of you on my email list. If you buy a copy now and send a screenshot of your purchase to contact@seanspicer.com, I will send a personalized book plate that you can put into your book with a message for you. Buy your copy now on Amazon here (https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/154605944X/ref=as_li_tl?ie=UTF8&camp=1789&creative=9325&creativeASIN=154605944X&linkCode=as2&tag=rigwilllc-20&linkId=fd1982c99e14e6630a6d1e91c469e7aa&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=66143d4e83-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_10_29_04_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-66143d4e83-68212193) , so you can read it before the election.

Thanks,

Sean

name: Team Cammack
subject: Two Options, One Real Choice
body:
Kat Cammack
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZE9375tp1IiYNcQMhgZoTADReKtvAmek3zgQw6vUqxR4sJ543MkrCeSn4RdmF4ZVXg5hXd1AkZ6cCnhVTA2C_jlHDF183kNvcLLa_dwk_0CEjZMDLbPD1AXBt9O4ZChan4dC7o4PFTiIjcrHAuqSeeedHIKC-lLL95UTN1QjBARLSe0laALtvA==&c=2idu4WbuLF4SMxUCGyaefbIqlXzyis3bY7B9chEKdKEnHjEg1jKf8A==&ch=Dnln6_C5mcz-MZtCJh-8DUfM7hnpb5KKpFWjB4FCtcNWPzKwdGpZ_w==)

| Friend,
Patriots like you will be deciding between two options for our country's future in the 2020 Election. But when we really look at these choices, the one real option becomes clear.
Our choice on November 3rd boils down to a pull between right and wrong. When we have seen liberal politicians stand on the side of a rioting, looting mob, instead of our law enforcement and first responders, it's clear that their radical leadership is the WRONG choice for America's future.
Kat Cammack represents the alternative to that, as she believes that we need to DEFEND the Police to make our communities safer and more prosperous.
[Will you stand with Kat this year so that she can give voice to the silent, conservative majority in Congress?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZE9375tp1IiYNcQMhgZoTADReKtvAmek3zgQw6vUqxR4sJ543MkrCeSn4RdmF4ZVXg5hXd1AkZ6cCnhVTA2C_jlHDF183kNvcLLa_dwk_0CEjZMDLbPD1AXBt9O4ZChan4dC7o4PFTiIjcrHAuqSeeedHIKC-lLL95UTN1QjBARLSe0laALtvA==&c=2idu4WbuLF4SMxUCGyaefbIqlXzyis3bY7B9chEKdKEnHjEg1jKf8A==&ch=Dnln6_C5mcz-MZtCJh-8DUfM7hnpb5KKpFWjB4FCtcNWPzKwdGpZ_w==)

| The one real choice for our country's future is to put the American people First.
And with the left's plans to prioritize mob demands, illegal immigrants, socialist pet projects, and everything except for OUR interests, it's clear that their agenda is the opposite of what we need.
[But by standing with Kat Cammack today](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZE9375tp1IiYNcQMhgZoTADReKtvAmek3zgQw6vUqxR4sJ543MkrCeSn4RdmF4ZVXg5hXd1AkZ6cCnhVTA2C_jlHDF183kNvcLLa_dwk_0CEjZMDLbPD1AXBt9O4ZChan4dC7o4PFTiIjcrHAuqSeeedHIKC-lLL95UTN1QjBARLSe0laALtvA==&c=2idu4WbuLF4SMxUCGyaefbIqlXzyis3bY7B9chEKdKEnHjEg1jKf8A==&ch=Dnln6_C5mcz-MZtCJh-8DUfM7hnpb5KKpFWjB4FCtcNWPzKwdGpZ_w==), you can side with the one clear choice for Florida and America!

name: Jack Heyden, Defeat Disinfo
subject: The story of how we got here
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTJCsId1J8RGpNqliS6611mkYIAZvY8Dv1OxRGYHMk_x4HEwHkStkhH-tE8M4XXq8qqap67iH1ObAUxCgBU5Y9BfxVlrk59y06YsQoG4BIlO1HyFnvp9gNlJDoOXYrP1CoVikRSKy18Ir5JSbxiBsTstxAT4lwENPIip19gGGCqdwMv9hv5oAEjz374rsEs-T-/36f/ehUINLB_SOCs_ax2GYNnig/h0/fJRdMgT1hr5XkdbEqDPCMQnlJzjtAyLPySvlaLDCKbw) Team —

It’s been a long road, and I would love to say we’ve reached its end. The gap that we set out to fill was created four years ago, but our “formal” introduction came on the first day of May, when _The Washington Post_ [documented our tech and how we intended to unleash it.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDUV27dB1SLFWpo-Uwox6ENY4_QEGxiZozHs9bwYxcm-2q0oAW9KPvOoQZYr6Hnwm2jpIlB24w34tjtej5OMcWXsxkA0SmE99oXfA7zgAsfJUrh_gi8_lDV_2EHIexISC2iP-Q8qhVUCtn9KIfL36WTGR5xzbMMCcP4WfELQywLkW5mk8Kk4fTVz_qu958UYTzov12j_4KY96n7V6SK7O4LlIaVxQkaAoQ_qvGuc4rOSRrfuwlmHzjKWoe1OgOuGuoGcL65o8FFbvRUpJBYyZNhQDIFdp0hMsqrOa4Gpi4Q3WCgyr9y0asII7b7JYZG4r06zLO81TW3l7v_-gf2tC0W8mCswrnxw9pvMGsPIUWvGLVkqDjoFrOONVXIB8biMWlgSBKgFYJZFVQOR4bR2m7uppPkb0vUppcYI-81X8bA8jakyUt8hNLN2cIqys8U3JyxH-Y64PDzw9sizkVUbBpSFbjjBDnwRszIHIWDdglCDetRKTFjLoxUSX-c6lpHK9TVFxGvXhfyRxTiBOz3hEpk/36f/ehUINLB_SOCs_ax2GYNnig/h1/FdzbxpK8W9Ak654tZCeq1sjp72d8t-frxPj3a6AkqX8)

In the weeks that followed, we used that tech to find disinfo as it bubbled over into national conversations. We used user-generated social media content to reach niche audiences that are nearly impossible to persuade through traditional political advertising.

We didn’t devise these campaigns in boardrooms listening to ad men, but on the Internet, listening to how real voters interacted with one another and with the news that came out of the White House.

Each time the conversation grew ripe with misinformation, we countered it with truth. We didn’t let up over the summer, hitting over half a million voters in a span of months.

When campaign season began to heat up, we saw another gap, one created by Trump’s callous visits to small towns in battleground states. We knew he was spreading COVID-19 to his supporters as indiscriminately as he spread lies, and we sought to counter the spread of both.

Through Covid Safe Communities, a targeted effort to make the impact of the pandemic real for people living in and around the towns where Trump was holding his rallies, and to highlight the risk posed by those events, we reached hundreds of thousands of conservative and moderate voters in swing states.

It’s been a long road, and I’m honored to have been a part of it, communicating with you, our supporters, and working with our team to find new and unorthodox ways to fight the erosion of truth.

I know you’re exhausted, your resources are stretched, and everyone is asking you to stretch them a little more. I can assure you, without a doubt in my mind, that those who have supported us in the past have made a real impact on what will happen Tuesday evening.

******[$10 alone can deliver truth to 1,500 Americans. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkbmgwzilLf32qVRo1e0L_yUkiArPFZDkIvobgDG89aQqYKJu0RIUOMfDqgEV8GBb2CnXob_r1osTDKgAf1enBcLG4ttPFVyq3H1zvRKvF4NL_f-n9gLCiKRrrxHGonbcJeFMnWThSiZD_F2Zhqb8cMUwDaQb0my85620j9VT6AJ4ntn1hzwEB67eVd5ehtZtbhnnvYrxBy1rOObYaXCpMcb5umnNGv87-RAfYUzEQA_e-GoP-ZxF2FXZ1q6Rs9bBVKRCPYeKnxtTkdtCGFpzusjL-Nk_1A8f32p6exdu5MAQqMfs3HzVKSD6TpRKEFJXaCGpT8dpPm__aKgpVRxM8V_LhMQmaPbHM0H-Wa0DLiwo/36f/ehUINLB_SOCs_ax2GYNnig/h2/dour_j6KPZI045GIZfdWeuMZ16dVMZIBGY04-HEZAYg) clean_body: | | | Team — It’s been a long road, and I would love to say we’ve reached its end. The gap that we set out to fill was created four years ago, but our “formal” introduction came on the first day of May, when The Washington Post In the weeks that followed, we used that tech to find disinfo as it bubbled over into national conversations. We used user-generated social media content to reach niche audiences that are nearly impossible to persuade through traditional political advertising. We didn’t devise these campaigns in boardrooms listening to ad men, but on the Internet, listening to how real voters interacted with one another and with the news that came out of the White House. Each time the conversation grew ripe with misinformation, we countered it with truth. We didn’t let up over the summer, hitting over half a million voters in a span of months. When campaign season began to heat up, we saw another gap, one created by Trump’s callous visits to small towns in battleground states. We knew he was spreading COVID-19 to his supporters as indiscriminately as he spread lies, and we sought to counter the spread of both. Through Covid Safe Communities, a targeted effort to make the impact of the pandemic real for people living in and around the towns where Trump was holding his rallies, and to highlight the risk posed by those events, we reached hundreds of thousands of conservative and moderate voters in swing states. It’s been a long road, and I’m honored to have been a part of it, communicating with you, our supporters, and working with our team to find new and unorthodox ways to fight the erosion of truth. I know you’re exhausted, your resources are stretched, and everyone is asking you to stretch them a little more. I can assure you, without a doubt in my mind, that those who have supported us in the past have made a real impact on what will happen Tuesday evening. **** We couldn’t have gotten here without you, Team. As always, thank you for being part of the fight. Jack Heyden Content Strategist Defeat Disinfo If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies. | | Sent via . **FROM THE TEAM**
We need to strengthen our public schools for all Delaware children. That's why Governor Carney's biggest priority has been Opportunity Funding - $75 million for English learners, low-income students and new reading and mental health supports in schools.
There are 5 days until Election Day.
Share the below message with your friends and family to make sure we continue creating opportunities for Delaware children to succeed inside and outside the classroom through the COVID-19 pandemic and beyond.

subject: Virtual Election Night Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
We're excited to announce that we will be hosting a virtual watch party on election night! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/do-you-have-a-plan-to-vote-469890?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Hello Hoosier Republican,

We're excited to announce that we will be hosting a [virtual watch party](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=814ed3dadc&e=1acd9bb3d6) on election night!

After you've cast your vote, grab a drink and some snacks and join the fun from home! Keep an eye on our Facebook page at [https://www.facebook.com/indgop/live](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=023f8bf0b8&e=1acd9bb3d6), and we’ll have all the speeches live. We're excited to have you join us virtually as we celebrate Republican wins up and down the ballot.
[\--> Click here to join us live on Election Night <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2ef53ad5a4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Thank you to everyone who played a part in helping members of our Republican team during this crucial election. You're helping keep Indiana moving in the right direction!

-Your Indiana Republican Party Team

body:

Like me, Tom’s a dealmaker and we need to keep him in Congress. Tom’s focus has always been on bettering the lives of Arizona families. He’s delivered over a billion dollars in new federal funding for Arizona schools, wrote legislation that would reduce prescription drug costs, and has delivered millions of dollars in funding to tribal communities. [**Please consider making a $25 donation to help Congressman Tom O’Halleran win one of our nation’s most important House races.**](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=96f793dbc33c4d37a9d4a3def97c8689&_e=C4VmSfBUY5PtRwg8zbTWDAzYzDcxuwR9RY8YZX2r1GRPoAbPMciAHap0EHueH-83jMSZ5bdKoLGtFjgtaV8qt90KGoQXZ7P3-MTQXHOq3iXYms8PGQnJ660t9B-Vb9JzCMLyNvr4TbBUx34VcChnQopusVZxOKciaOodeCiPIZBpJHLb8mIPyt2xMm2UdE6KtrnVTqKquId_eJQh3s_AesQzdXPSHslYSIkDrHuvu5qOArgkeDG6NEm9LNj2XOkwnhcR1CxQWFKg6WNYYjIPuEHUce7uHyX3PscUIayhA7RHym9NSNyjGQbuVzYmap_IZ1XZeJX-d6dhCPAKCmQxScnJud4auIQEpPDZ4RicJgXsFfk-wAiFWphjjscVOuyJYRTlYVZ2dLTzhbGJwYu9Paj8kRRScGPH2_Yam1_MnaEr6LJVFHxOlDG7OcSeMNLT7dDsb5wk0FnU1w7IPvB1l_C3-EKQXJDTlSTIKAT0f50suRdvJRe78VrMS1A4jaYg) **Here are three reasons we need your support right now:**
1. The election is only 5 days away & we need to get Tom’s message in front of undecided voters
2. Donald Trump and Republican Super PACs are targeting Tom’s seat
3. He needs your help to raise $30,000 before Get Out the Vote

The House Majority could depend on what happens in Arizona’s first and most competitive district, which is why Tom needs your support ASAP! [**Please donate $25 right now to my good friend Tom O’Halleran’s campaign.**](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=96f793dbc33c4d37a9d4a3def97c8689&_e=C4VmSfBUY5PtRwg8zbTWDAzYzDcxuwR9RY8YZX2r1GRPoAbPMciAHap0EHueH-83jMSZ5bdKoLGtFjgtaV8qt90KGoQXZ7P3-MTQXHOq3iXYms8PGQnJ660t9B-Vb9JzCMLyNvr4TbBUx34VcChnQopusVZxOKciaOodeCiPIZBpJHLb8mIPyt2xMm2UdE6KtrnVTqKquId_eJQh3s_AesQzdXPSHslYSIkDrHuvu5qOArgkeDG6NEm9LNj2XOkwnhcR1CxQWFKg6WNYYjIPuEHUce7uHyX3PscUIayhA7TyNn6RfeaQArCJs-9x9nch_37ZwWNFUdm3towTIdbJmqhuEK9IG5RMAVRNQ8F9M8sKWfDFtKGC8uI2-n2uXO79p1sIJEWZu0Re2kmidgCHL6rb1B8EPSVJJV_PUQ155nd9rOqqon4oUtNMchHFR41lNSFifQPApvfjXv5dsBrmdmzWDDEgupBTdXc0XE9HA-JUjD15FBq3OrprHfct9TXx) Hope you are well,

| Peter,

**[We need your support now more than ever.](https://act.myngp.com/el/uoUfimt8_NOYuI0At36XP_jqAUTu25S_m7yPgylIFiM=/XVacosJhF_mpm4HZfySKNSGxBKlgp3LJL1xWuCx3Y-4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201029-1-EM&amount=25)** There are just five days left before Election Day, and the stakes have never been higher.

---
Since the time Abigail first decided to run, outside Republican groups have targeted her and this district. They have spent over $10 million on false attacks and lies against Abigail.

In 2018, they failed using this strategy, and we are doing all we can to ensure their lies don't work this time around. In the final days of this campaign, these groups are throwing all they have into VA-07, amplifying the same lies they pushed in 2018.

**[Abigail and I know their ads rely on extreme deception to garner support for her opponent, but the average viewer wouldn 't know immediately that they are peddling lies.](https://act.myngp.com/el/uoUfimt8_NOYuI0At36XP_jqAUTu25S_m7yPgylIFiM=/XVacosJhF_mpm4HZfySKNSGxBKlgp3LJL1xWuCx3Y-4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201029-1-EM&amount=25)**

We need to set the record straight. Central Virginians deserve to hear about Abigail's strong record of fighting for them and the district.

**_[Peter, can you contribute to Abigail's re-election campaign today so we can fight back against these ongoing attacks?](https://act.myngp.com/el/uoUfimt8_NOYuI0At36XP_jqAUTu25S_m7yPgylIFiM=/XVacosJhF_mpm4HZfySKNSGxBKlgp3LJL1xWuCx3Y-4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201029-1-EM&amount=25)_**

**[I want to emphasize that none of this would be possible without support from people like you.](https://act.myngp.com/el/uoUfimt8_NOYuI0At36XP_jqAUTu25S_m7yPgylIFiM=/XVacosJhF_mpm4HZfySKNSGxBKlgp3LJL1xWuCx3Y-4=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201029-1-EM&amount=25)** Since Abigail doesn't take money from corporate PACs, this campaign relies on small grassroots donations to reach potential voters across VA-07.

Thank you for your continued support,
Adam

body:

We are the brave wing of the RINO-infested GOP that defends President Trump from the Radical Left and the fake news media. We are the Silent Majority that is tired of the D.C swamp that invades countries no one has ever heard of, ships our jobs to China, and caves to the Democrats every time it matters.

name: Marcy, Team Warner Digital Director
subject: a quick ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
We're just 5 days away from Election Day, Derek!

I'm sure that your inbox is full of requests for last-minute donations, so I'll make this quick.

Here's my ask: [**can you chip in $5 to help us reach voters in these last 5 days?**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9ed/53d9897e/55677867/1c88cafb/369843055/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-last-stretch?refcode=20201029_f_2_nd__924__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

**Here's what the digital team can do with your contributions five days out from the election:**
* Pay for the digital ads already reaching voters on social media, Snapchat, and on online news outlets.
* Expand the reach of our digital ads in these final days before the election to get out the vote in every corner of the Commonwealth.

We're setting turnout records in Virginia with more than 2 million votes already cast, but that doesn't mean we can let up on the pressure. We're working hard to make sure that we turn out as many voters as possible, and that means reaching folks where they are: on their phones and computers.

Chipping in $5 will help us reach more voters and make sure they have the tools to make their voices heard. [**Can we count on you?**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9ed/53d9897e/55677867/1c88cafa/369843055/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-last-stretch?refcode=20201029_f_2_nd__924__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")

Thank you,

Marcy, Team Warner Digital Director

name: Mark Kelly
subject: We can win Arizona with your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
**ARIZONA SENATE POLL
Mark Kelly (DEM) - 46%
Martha McSally (REP) - 44%**
Senator Rosen said I could reach out one more time about Arizona, team.
Recently, a Mitch McConnell-backed dark money group spent $2.3 million on a last-minute effort to defeat us, and last week we found out another super PAC is dumping $2 million into this race.
With the polls showing this race neck-and-neck, we can't let McConnell's allies gain momentum. That's why I need your support in the final days of this race to flip this seat.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, We’re 5 DAYS from Election Day and see a record turnout from early voting. WE NEED YOUR HELP. Hundreds of volunteers across New Mexico have been working hard to help with our grassroots programs. Are you available to volunteer this Saturday, October 31, for U.S. Senate candidate Mark Ronchetti? If so, we need help safely knocking on doors! | We need door knockers to safely knock doors at 10am and 2pm this Saturday. For this commitment, we will assign you a location and a walk-list convenient for your schedule. Our team will train you. Please RSVP to get involved! After Mark’s big debate win, an endorsement from New Mexico’s largest circulated newspaper, the Albuquerque Journal - momentum is building. This Election will be close, and Mark needs your help! Thank you for your help, Mark Ronchetti PS: THIS IS IT!!! THE LAST WEEKEND TO WIN THIS ELECTION! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

| | Friend, Donald Trump is making a stop in Minnesota this week in a last minute attempt to turn Minnesota red. This time, Trump is visiting Rochester: the sight of a competitive Congressional race, a competitive state Senate race, and a pickup opportunity for our race to protect and expand the House DFL Majority. **This is not an accident.** Minnesota Republicans know how important this area is to the fate of our state and country and they will not let up until Election Day - we can't either. We are working very hard to turn Rochester completely blue next week and this presidential visit could potentially throw a wrench in those plans. Will you contribute to our race today? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Donate $15**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AUyomhwS7wU3hYo1iIYgkSvmP8oOgQSGHbLEHNWRQYU=/hNTL2yS538MvR0hbKJShmH-auSOILTCGL_opHLoBvaU=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=102920) _ _ [**Donate $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AUyomhwS7wU3hYo1iIYgkSvmP8oOgQSGHbLEHNWRQYU=/hNTL2yS538MvR0hbKJShmH-auSOILTCGL_opHLoBvaU=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=102920) _ _ [**Donate $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AUyomhwS7wU3hYo1iIYgkSvmP8oOgQSGHbLEHNWRQYU=/hNTL2yS538MvR0hbKJShmH-auSOILTCGL_opHLoBvaU=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=102920) _ _ [**Donate $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AUyomhwS7wU3hYo1iIYgkSvmP8oOgQSGHbLEHNWRQYU=/hNTL2yS538MvR0hbKJShmH-auSOILTCGL_opHLoBvaU=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=102920) _ _ [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AUyomhwS7wU3hYo1iIYgkSvmP8oOgQSGHbLEHNWRQYU=/hNTL2yS538MvR0hbKJShmH-auSOILTCGL_opHLoBvaU=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=102920) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Strong House DFL races are the base for Democratic victories up and down the ballot. **Your donation today will help us counter the president 's divisive message we know he will continue to spread tomorrow. **Together, we will reject Trump's divisive politics and build a better future for all Minnesotans. Thank you, House DFL Team P.S. Don't forget, if you haven't donated yet this year, **Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state through the Minnesota PCR Program.** Take advantage of this program before it is too late. _ _ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AUyomhwS7wU3hYo1iIYgkSvmP8oOgQSGHbLEHNWRQYU=/hNTL2yS538MvR0hbKJShmH-auSOILTCGL_opHLoBvaU=?refcode=102920)

name: Sara Gideon
subject: I am humbly asking you to make a contribution to support my campaign for U.S. Senate in Maine.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there --
I am humbly asking you to make a contribution to support my campaign against Senator Collins in Maine.
Because here is the truth:
**Our race is very likely to determine control of the U.S. Senate.**
And everything from our health care to voting rights to reproductive freedom could hinge on who controls the Senate.
And we know that if Susan Collins is reelected, Mitch McConnell will stay in control of the Senate.
That's why he is spending outrageous amounts of money to save this seat for Senator Collins and stay in power in Washington.
So I have to ask:
[**Can I count on you to make a contribution today, before it 's too late to make a difference? You can make your contribution here:**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc63a/2a380d31/2042249d/f045e4/2364730871/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyOV9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201029_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Sara Gideon and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc63a/2a380d31/2042249d/f045e5/2364730871/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyOV9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201029_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc63a/2a380d31/2042249d/f045e6/2364730871/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyOV9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201029_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc63a/2a380d31/2042249d/f045e7/2364730871/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyOV9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201029_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc63a/2a380d31/2042249d/f045e4/2364730871/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyOV9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201029_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
We are funding this campaign the right way, with lots and lots of people chipping in small amounts because they know how important it is that we flip this Senate seat and replace Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader.
I am so proud of that fact. But it does mean we are extraordinarily dependent on grassroots contributions from supporters like you.
That's why this request is so important -- especially right now, with hundreds of thousands of Mainers already casting ballots early.
[**So please, make a contribution if you can afford it. $3 would be so helpful.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc63a/2a380d31/2042249d/f045e4/2364730871/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyOV9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201029_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
It means so much to me to know you have my back in this final stretch before Election Day. Thank you for your support.
All my best,
Sara Gideon

clean_body: Open this email to find out what you need to do to make your voice heard. | | | Friend, We’re in the final home stretch - Election Day is Tuesday! | | Matt is nearly even with Pappas in the polls and we just found out Real Clear Politics is calling NH-01 a “toss-up.” This election is critical and there is so much at stake, especially here in New Hampshire. It doesn’t matter if you head to the polls to cast your ballot in person or decide to stay home and vote absentee - the important thing is that you make your voice heard and VOTE MOWERS. VOTING IN PERSON Are you planning to vote in person next week? | | VOTING ABSENTEE Voting absentee instead? | | Right now, Matt is neck-and-neck with Chris Pappas. Despite Nancy Pelosi’s money being funneled to the Pappas campaign, our grassroots team has given Matt a real chance of winning this race. Friend, we’re counting on you to make that happen by voting in person or casting your absentee ballot for Matt Mowers. Thanks, Team Mowers | While Chris Pappas can count on Nancy Pelosi's deep pockets for funding, Matt Mowers is running a campaign funded by supporters like you. clean_body: Prove her wrong. | Friend, I need you to see this from the Houston Chronicle : By shrugging off our fundraising surge, she’s shrugging off the thousands of Texas voters who have made donations of $10, $15, $25, $50 to power our grassroots campaign. But what more can we expect from a representative who couldn’t even be bothered to show up for our debate? Let’s teach Lizzie a lesson not to shrug off her constituents any longer by funding our final fundraising blitz to get our final ads up and fuel our ground game. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Brutal.
body:
Yesterday, I shared with you some of my favorite parts of campaigning and alluded to it not being all rainbows and puppies (reminder that my opponent | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ac652f1bab9c/brutal?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Yesterday, I shared with you some of my favorite parts of campaigning and alluded to it not being all rainbows and puppies (reminder that my opponent has voted against LGBTQ+ rights, mitigations for the climate crisis, and protections for endangered species like wolves).

Let’s get real. There are parts of running for Congress that are really rough, and they’re the same things that motivate me to keep hustling and grinding.

1. The sexism. My god, the sexism. You’d be shocked if it weren’t exactly as bad as you expected. The number of people who assume I’m a man. The times I’ve been spoken down to, ignored, assumed to be the proxy for some faceless but more-qualified-solely-by-virtue-of-his-gender candidate. The zillions of comments about my appearance. The threats. The propositions. **And it’s not just me.** We have a women-heavy team, and the hoops my staff have to jump through just to be taken seriously are offensive and outrageous.

1. The endorsement process. You guys, PACs are lobbyists. Lobbyists are PACs. There are exceptions, of course, and our campaign has been tremendously lucky to have support from a broad coalition of people and organizations who are fighting for the same values we all are. But there are a lot of organizations out there fighting to preserve the status quo. **I’m not here for the status quo. **

1. Call time. Now this one is tricky. I _love_ talking to people. I love talking to donors. But the structure of campaigns is such that candidates like me spend more time talking to donors than we do talking to voters. That’s wrong. The most gratifying conversations I have are the ones when I talk to people in IL-16 and witness their stories and know that, when I am elected, I’m going to be able to help them.

We aren’t talking about new things here. These problems aren’t unique to me. They’re not even personal. They’re products of a system that is designed to keep wealthy and powerful people wealthy and powerful and everyone else out. We need meaningful diversity in our representation, and we need comprehensive campaign finance reform.

We can fix this, but I need your help to get there. [Chip in today if you believe in representation and true democracy.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=203d2b1c79&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani

clean_body: I hoped I could set the record straight... | Friend, I was just on Fox News defending President Trump against the mainstream media and big tech’s bias, censorship, and radical agenda. I know you're just as sick of the blatant lies they’re telling about our great President as I am, so I thought I could reach out to you for help right now. Election day is just days away, and I need your urgent support to keep our momentum going in Florida all the way until the last ballot is turned in on November 3rd. I’m not just running my own Congressional race, Friend - I’m running to help mobilize my Florida district to re-elect President Trump. With the Liberal powerhouses of the mainstream media and big tech working against us, the President is leaning on every district in the Sunshine State to do their part. I’m proud to be one of the allies he believes in to keep Florida red, but I can’t do this job alone. Securing our must-win state depends on all of us stepping up to the plate, and I hope we’ve helped inspire you to join our fight. Thank you, Rep. Byron Donalds Official Republican Nominee for Congress Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress. 2430 Vanderbilt Beach Road, Ste 108 PMB 260, Naples, FL 34108

Hey friend \- this is big.

**The University of New Hampshire just released their latest Granite State Poll and we can’t believe it.**

We knew the race was going to be very tight. Real Clear Politics even called it a “toss up” earlier this week.

**With just four days to go until Election Day, Matt Mowers is up 50%-48% over Pappas.** Friend, we were down 18 points last month. I have NEVER seen a surge like this before - and it’s happening at exactly the right time.

body:
It’s time to set the record straight on Parris Island. That’s why I joined Representatives Joe Wilson and Ralph Norman in writing this OpEd for... | |
---
[ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=a29a1d8b37bb4761aa1e05917600624b&_e=iwlJqrlKI48Ge41OMzIxl8OCEMvH54R9Mu9VPVCAN8iy__mK0sv4CJW8Y0BPgGwP7tsMMCGbzvKxKOMjvBx3rYlZMfNDMFtp5UrL7xPEnR89o5bf1g3__8_5xS4VJ6BLciO5qSy6mz04Xz1_1YP2Kx2BSmi-BDCIDzesSwwDS_jjYIDri30NbeDI6TWIz2hVFiPaf-_cwTu__v4MGcSooHi47oI1yFQu_F4iNG12p_qYfxL1GFqvWy6je5pdYVo1FGEG1BIVRk7CRZYktfPpkJHRhI8Y_31BMWUENYimwBzO8c9EX_tWsN48j3j3ikdI9Gw-HTet4RTuC6VB3xRmYr5gjKExZmmfI8yiSq6xqx6NMkFl59aIef48BlT3nUeTli_QzEimPiG7ReMaA9NpGTTu7j-ugX_J0Wcv4vwg0H_PK2rhNlhVJ-hqVVWt3DhVbIXLusJkQ72-es2Rvz4EthxRqPkvuQpguFU35OMNFjRpd07JIjNbvlw2lcG7f-mc)
Friend,

It’s time to set the record straight on Parris Island.

That’s why I joined Representatives Joe Wilson and Ralph Norman in writing this OpEd for The State.
[**Read our op-ed on Parris Island**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=a29a1d8b37bb4761aa1e05917600624b&_e=iwlJqrlKI48Ge41OMzIxl8OCEMvH54R9Mu9VPVCAN8iy__mK0sv4CJW8Y0BPgGwP7tsMMCGbzvKxKOMjvBx3rYlZMfNDMFtp5UrL7xPEnR89o5bf1g3__8_5xS4VJ6BLciO5qSy6mz04Xz1_1YP2Kx2BSmi-BDCIDzesSwwDS_jjYIDri30NbeDI6TWIz2hVFiPaf-_cwTu__v4MGcSooHi47oI1yFQu_F4iNG12p_qYfxL1GFqvWy6je5pdYVo1FGEG1BIVRk7CRZYktfPpkJHRhI8Y_31BMWUENYimwBxqbs-vvNtjwJlu5c7UgWE584W3bGIiiPAFQvtV3B01OcC5l8S2Ie4BHvW39CGg7clbewaJjC9hTzYx_VpDp-VmboXbM8bt3T_i7OkifeNSNFEE44MJGrounNFRUD_QNIsCXPK-a6kjEftqfG-2GdedVl6eGwbzGLcHAB9mo-BTx1_qh4AbFzGve-DZw3Tt25GUa-cqgWzWjVNS2drJlzMk)
Parris Island is an integral part of the Lowcountry’s cultural and economic backbone. Marines have trained to defend our freedoms at Parris Island for more than a century, and it is a crucial part of our national security infrastructure.

The economic impact that Parris Island has on our community can’t be overstated — **the Marine Corps base provides nearly 6,000 jobs and more than $700 million of economic activity to the Lowcountry.**

But despite the obvious benefit to our district and our country’s national security, liberal politicians in Washington — including Democrat Joe Cunningham — decided to put Parris Island on the chopping block.
[**Read our op-ed on Parris Island**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=a29a1d8b37bb4761aa1e05917600624b&_e=iwlJqrlKI48Ge41OMzIxl8OCEMvH54R9Mu9VPVCAN8iy__mK0sv4CJW8Y0BPgGwP7tsMMCGbzvKxKOMjvBx3rYlZMfNDMFtp5UrL7xPEnR89o5bf1g3__8_5xS4VJ6BLciO5qSy6mz04Xz1_1YP2Kx2BSmi-BDCIDzesSwwDS_jjYIDri30NbeDI6TWIz2hVFiPaf-_cwTu__v4MGcSooHi47oI1yFQu_F4iNG12p_qYfxL1GFqvWy6je5pdYVo1FGEG1BIVRk7CRZYktfPpkJHRhI8Y_31BMWUENYimwBx6QtoCG3Z1xp-hdKIh0MIgO8YRxvv8jQ5xrcOS57s-C_0wNe13lG5NtLtUnPeLlqTF53Xqu6fviZManBo9CFmzzGCPppszPMGWlC02nTJDKYaWSBkaspTuYZdIS9JP0_cyTSG__SiXR-NgHewoKmhsISFCoLdT5mEa7Ze5qqHUdxhDqruZ7Vy9wr68bigy4ypLKyJzUX9hTxLbt4ww95vR)
We simply cannot afford to lose Parris Island. That’s why I brought together a coalition of South Carolina lawmakers who are willing to stand up for our military and the Lowcountry, and that’s why I’ve made it a core issue of this campaign.

It’s crystal clear that Democrat Joe Cunningham dropped the ball on Parris Island, and frankly, incredible, that he didn’t defend one of the Lowcountry’s most important institutions.

He’s dodged responsibility for abandoning Parris Island every step of the way and cast blame for this fiasco on everyone but himself.

**He’s even sown doubt about the actual risk to Parris Island, despite the fact the Commandant of the Marine Corps, General David Berger, stated publicly that Parris Island risks closing. **

_Friend, the Parris Island debacle showcases exactly why Democrat Joe Cunningham doesn’t deserve re-election. _

I encourage you to read the full op-ed below and get the full story on Parris Island.
[**Read our op-ed on Parris Island**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=a29a1d8b37bb4761aa1e05917600624b&_e=iwlJqrlKI48Ge41OMzIxl8OCEMvH54R9Mu9VPVCAN8iy__mK0sv4CJW8Y0BPgGwP7tsMMCGbzvKxKOMjvBx3rYlZMfNDMFtp5UrL7xPEnR89o5bf1g3__8_5xS4VJ6BLciO5qSy6mz04Xz1_1YP2Kx2BSmi-BDCIDzesSwwDS_jjYIDri30NbeDI6TWIz2hVFiPaf-_cwTu__v4MGcSooHi47oI1yFQu_F4iNG12p_qYfxL1GFqvWy6je5pdYVo1FGEG1BIVRk7CRZYktfPpkJHRhI8Y_31BMWUENYimwBzjnC2zaYEgySzhYw1Sv2BzzBpZb4y2IpCr8NX4HBl8N97x90jBoZM6YKik6lg-_1RJB0QJW1JYavKCqnZWuS7OOT0kxRt3UngKzh7ox7-RbxmpssrSqnoxLR9YXCSo_WewCrtj-eT9yUAG3qEKx1GLOl2T1qj_afX_rkx1rsuCEAKbVaXm6zj9AsHxAejZCHw0NcUZOY0zjjJ_aInM86hK)
Thank you,

Nancy Mace

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: The 3 I's
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
This virus has been with us for 8 long months, and we're all tired. We miss going to concerts and sporting events. We miss being able to hug our friends and family. But as hard as this is, we need to double down on our COVID safety measures--and we need to do so now. We're at a critical moment, and we need to make a major change to our behaviors if we're going to slow the spread of this virus and save lives. You've heard Dr. Alexander-Scott and I talk a lot about the 3Ws: wear your mask, wash your hands, and watch your distance. Today, I'm asking you to also think about the 3I's - situations to avoid. 1) Informal: One interesting piece of data we've found in our case investigations is that across the board, events are safer when there's structure to them. For example, seated restaurants are less risky than standing bars, and a catered wedding is safer than a buffet. If you're going to be with other people, make sure the event is structured.
2) Indoors: The virus spreads more easily indoors, where it can easily travel through the air. Whenever you can, avoid indoor social gatherings. If you're in need of outdoor space, consider making a reservation at one of our state parks through our [Take It Outside initiative](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016-iOEEJK9bj0vy-T_btBrfIWY91f7tTAaG2nqDmd7S57GfMTJpnV_RBTZnoYD6YMSJUbJSLNXuUaKF58R4EFgBzXsoan8xRSKy9b5tl8ExQxUtVgAvsxEStTl05zssykNX9CtklmoyBrAJ2Z7fR_PIsy4wkS4a7Jptnpo3Tu2Yw=&c=2nCIb5O_juGGFywAVghknyoHRGBvLFVC2vO6aaGzLbyg-f6htqZA6A==&ch=Xu_I0h57nlGjpZaFoOEYfwb_VicmxSXBZppCQ3F693jPtvbQ4rp2cg==).
3) Inconsistent: The reason we're asking you to limit the size of your social gatherings is so that if you do get sick, you don't become a super-spreader. That only works if you keep your groups consistent. If you get together with 14 other people, contract the virus, and then see a different 14 people the next day, you've now doubled the reach of the virus--even though you haven't attended a gathering of more than 15. To keep yourself and your loved ones safe, make a list of the people you need to see--your immediate family, maybe a few coworkers--and stick to that group as much as possible.
All of these precautions are crucial, and we all need to make sure that we are doing all three all the time to stop the spread of COVID-19, no exceptions. Like you, I'm anxious to get Rhode Island to a place where we can see our friends and families the way we used to. But we can't get there until we all start following the recommendations of our doctors and scientists. For more information, visit [health.ri.gov/covid](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016-iOEEJK9bj0vy-T_btBrfIWY91f7tTAaG2nqDmd7S57GfMTJpnV_YPdGe-XmI4mUPUjcp5Fs8KFpOZqxnvR4iO-WQ-oZNNkLub_A6U_KhlRbfUG31_yumTIXgawS323-2iqJJdEXogG6geG9T0pqw==&c=2nCIb5O_juGGFywAVghknyoHRGBvLFVC2vO6aaGzLbyg-f6htqZA6A==&ch=Xu_I0h57nlGjpZaFoOEYfwb_VicmxSXBZppCQ3F693jPtvbQ4rp2cg==).
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. clean_body: | | | | | | | Hello friend, This virus has been with us for 8 long months, and we're all tired. We miss going to concerts and sporting events. We miss being able to hug our friends and family. But as hard as this is, we need to double down on our COVID safety measures--and we need to do so now. We're at a critical moment, and we need to make a major change to our behaviors if we're going to slow the spread of this virus and save lives. You've heard Dr. Alexander-Scott and I talk a lot about the 3Ws: wear your mask, wash your hands, and watch your distance. Today, I'm asking you to also think about the 3I's - situations to avoid. 1) Informal: One interesting piece of data we've found in our case investigations is that across the board, events are safer when there's structure to them. For example, seated restaurants are less risky than standing bars, and a catered wedding is safer than a buffet. If you're going to be with other people, make sure the event is structured. 2) Indoors: The virus spreads more easily indoors, where it can easily travel through the air. Whenever you can, avoid indoor social gatherings. If you're in need of outdoor space, consider making a reservation at one of our state parks through our ==. 3) Inconsistent: The reason we're asking you to limit the size of your social gatherings is so that if you do get sick, you don't become a super-spreader. That only works if you keep your groups consistent. If you get together with 14 other people, contract the virus, and then see a different 14 people the next day, you've now doubled the reach of the virus--even though you haven't attended a gathering of more than 15. To keep yourself and your loved ones safe, make a list of the people you need to see--your immediate family, maybe a few coworkers--and stick to that group as much as possible. All of these precautions are crucial, and we all need to make sure that we are doing all three all the time to stop the spread of COVID-19, no exceptions. Like you, I'm anxious to get Rhode Island to a place where we can see our friends and families the way we used to. But we can't get there until we all start following the recommendations of our doctors and scientists. For more information, visit ==. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I wouldn't ask if it weren't important, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a5/1466416292/VEsH/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-email-logo?refcode=logo")

| | | Peter, [we have just five days until this election is over and we're seeing new negative attack ads directed against us. We can fight back, but we need your help. So, I'm asking: can you pitch in $10?](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a4/1466416292/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102920_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

**[CHIP IN >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a4/1466416292/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102920_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**
You've heard it a lot, because it's true: this is the most important election of our lifetime.

[That's why our team is working around the clock to make sure we're not leaving one single vote on the table -- but our race is on track to be one of the most expensive governor's races in the country this year.](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a4/1466416292/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102920_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

Dark money groups are spending nearly [$10 million dollars](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a4/1466416292/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102920_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000") running negative attack ads against me, including one launched this week. And Donald Trump keeps coming back to our state in this closing stretch to help swing this election for my opponent. We need the resources to compete.

[Whether or not we win comes down to how many voters we reach in these final days.](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a4/1466416292/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102920_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000") That's why raising another $145,000 to reach our Path to Progress Victory Fund goal is critical, but right now we're falling behind where we need to be.

[This election is going to be close, Peter. So if you're able, can I count on you to pitch in $10 to help us fight back against these negative ads and continue to mobilize historic numbers of voters?](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a4/1466416292/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102920_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

**[CHIP IN $5 >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a4/1466416292/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiI1In0%3D/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102920_REAC_ALL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**

**[CHIP IN $10 >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a4/1466416292/VEsP/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102920_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**

**[CHIP IN $25 >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a4/1466416292/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102920_REAC_ALL&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**

**[CHIP IN $50 >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a4/1466416292/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102920_REAC_ALL&amount=50&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**

**[CHIP IN $100 >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a4/1466416292/VEsHBw/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102920_REAC_ALL&amount=100&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**

Our victory in 2016 was hard-fought - we won by only two votes per precinct. That's right. Two. This grassroots team helped me cross the finish line then, and your support today will help us do it again.

Roy

P.S. - Early voting closes on Saturday. Lines might be long then, and on Election Day, so if you haven't already, make sure to get your vote in as early as possible!

_We hope everyone is staying safe during this ongoing health emergency. The Cooper Campaign is now working remotely, and we encourage all those who are able to practice social distancing. We 've taken the step of cancelling all in-person fundraising for the time being, making grassroots online outreach and fundraising even more critical than before. Roy and the rest of the team will keep working for a more prosperous, better-educated, and healthy North Carolina, and we hope you will stay with us in this fight. Further information on the Coronavirus and our response can be found [here.](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a7/1466416292/VEsHBg/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://www.ncdhhs.gov/divisions/public-health/coronavirus-disease-2019-covid-19-response-north-carolina")_
---

|
* * *

Thank you for supporting Roy! Emails are a crucial method of keeping supporters like you updated from the campaign trail, and for fundraising -- Roy has been fighting for a healthier, wealthier, and better educated North Carolina for the last four years thanks to grassroots activists like you, Peter. If you would like to make a contribution to keep Roy fighting for North Carolina, please [click here.](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a6/1466416292/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiUGV0ZXIiLCJKU1ZNWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIn0%3D/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-footer&amount=25&refcode=footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=")

[DONATE TO RE-ELECT ROY >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96a6/1466416292/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiUGV0ZXIiLCJKU1ZNWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIn0%3D/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-footer&amount=25&refcode=footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to receive only the most urgent updates from our campaign, please [click here.](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96b9/1466416292/VEsHAw/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://act.roycooper.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") To unsubscribe please [click here.](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120093b/2fde7c66/4f53fc0d/156e96b8/1466416292/VEsHAg/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe")

Friend,

_We’re in a full-court press until Election Day. _

**What does that mean? It means we need every single Hoosier who wants to keep building One Indiana for All to go all-in for Governor Holcomb from today through November 3rd.**
