name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW: Economic comeback under President Trump breaks 70-year record
body:
News broke this morning that real GDP grew at an annualized rate of 33.1% in the third quarter of 2020—beating expectations... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7100bcf605&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 29, 2020
---
| | |
# **NEW: Economic comeback under President Trump breaks 70-year record**

**News broke** this morning that real GDP grew at an annualized rate of 33.1% in the third quarter of 2020—beating expectations and setting an all-time record.

**This jump in GDP** is nearly _double_ the previous record set 70 years ago.

**Thanks to President Trump’s **policies, the American economy is weathering the global pandemic better than any other major Western country, including those of Europe. As the Council of Economic Advisers wrote this morning:
| | _While the pandemic hit every major economy around the world, the United States experienced the least severe economic contraction of any major Western economy in the first half of 2020, with the Euro Area economy’s contraction being 1.5 times as severe as the contraction of the U.S. economy._ |
---|---|---

**Since April, **America has gained over 11.4 million jobs, recovering more than half of those lost because of lockdowns. Retail sales are already above pre-pandemic levels, many construction and manufacturing jobs have returned, business activity is at a 20-month high, and new jobless claims fell to their lowest level this week since the beginning of the pandemic.

**This “V-shaped” recovery **is beating economist predictions and outpacing the slow recovery under former President Obama. After the 2008-09 recession, it took the Obama Administration 4 times as long to regain the same share of lost economic output.

**🎬** [**WATCH: The media has an obligation to share this news.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c882ebe2b1&e=3ee4985eea)

**Two big reasons **explain President Trump’s success. The first is that his pro-growth, pro-worker agenda made our economic fundamentals stronger. Before Coronavirus swept the globe, American incomes hit a record high in 2019 while poverty rates hit a record low. Median incomes saw their biggest one-year jump _ever_.

**Second, President Trump** took targeted action to help American workers and families after the Coronavirus hit. His Administration negotiated the CARES Act, implemented the Paycheck Protection Program to save jobs, extended supplemental unemployment benefits, paused student loan payments, and halted evictions.

**Today, the left wants** to emulate Europe, issue endless lockdowns, and use the pandemic as an excuse to grow government control of the economy and society. President Trump wants to keep working with the private sector, protect the most vulnerable among us, and safely reopen our economy and schools.

**Today’s GDP report** makes it clear: The data supports President Trump’s strategy.

**The Great American Comeback** is well underway—a testament to both President Trump’s policies and the strength and resilience of America’s workers and families.

📖 [**Great American Recovery: 3rd quarter GDP smashes expectations**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c0f7251ab0&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬** [**Larry Kudlow: The Trump agenda gave momentum to businesses**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ecfe58584c&e=3ee4985eea)
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump departs Goodyear, Arizona** | October 28, 2020
---
|

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: You're Invited: Stand Up For Texas Energy Rally with Wesley Hunt and Dan Crenshaw
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Join Houston oil and gas businesses, Wesley Hunt, and Congressman Dan Crenshaw tomorrow from 3:00pm - 5:00pm to rally behind Houston's energy industry.

Our oil and gas industry is the backbone of the 7th District here in Houston. But recently oil and gas workers have come under attack, and thanks to radical energy proposals in Congress, their livelihoods are on the chopping block. As Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Nancy Pelosi look to mandate our energy industry out of existence, businesses and community leaders are fighting back and standing up for the industry and the millions of Texans it supports.

The oil and gas industry in Houston helps hundreds of thousands of families put food on the table, provides affordable electricity to homes and businesses nationwide, and is foundational to the atmosphere of economic and entrepreneurial opportunity in our city. Don't miss out on this opportunity to take a stand and show your support for Texas energy.

We hope you will join us tomorrow at Lime Instruments, 1187 Brittmoore Road to enjoy some barbecue and show support for the oil and gas industry.

Thank you,
Team Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=d3ba990a934444c1b5cb86579bd8f49c&_e=JBygRC1c95UJ7C0xAKf-X8dwhcTMTjupunmbOtDyO5HxgAkT7k4WE0IMlmMIbeiCNGEmcejvihx9iYhJtLccc2gcoKkJKDK310B7HG56BQy8OLvmKhDkPviM5mDJmsAsndP8Ythuttd6os_8lm_hXKSRjT0OYPn2w-lpkWDJcbUhpSrTqN6V2hQUMc2nMZI644YbQVboQ26Z15dWxUGSd_g6T9f830LzNmGPbAoxBiBtHhe1UpJ0cFiaSccMJ2Dd3gprBEiLAAa1XE-mmWp9oqHOB76KJs8cUv93QPU4TYk%3D)****

body:
Montana is a Priority State |

| |
# Montana Decides the Fate of the US Senate
# This morning in Billings I had the true honor of speaking with Senator Cruz about our elections in Montana. Ted Cruz believes that control of the US Senate will be determined by Senator Daines winning or losing.

Return you ballot! Vote Republican up and down.

In these final days the eyes of the nation are locked on how Montana will vote. Will we have two Democratic Senators, a fifth term of a Democrat Governor, and a Land Board made up of anti-AG Democrats. This is a reality if we don't fight hard in these finals days.

We are nearly out of time and if the Democrats can flip Montana blue they will take away our free-speech rights and Second Amendment. Help us show that Montanans are voting for Republicans.

_Please consider donating $50 today. $25 to help Steve Daines get reelected and $25 to my campaign to ensure we have a strong conservative in the Auditors office. _

body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7BhkofPSF6OuRU&b=4KEb6Cy4WcB6fiz2Cx2XEg

Hi Peter,

I have worked hard, fought, allied myself with the President in this Florida district- and now I'm surging ahead.

But now I need your help urgently to close this deal!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative veteran and fighter who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7BhkofPSF6OuRU&b=4KEb6Cy4WcB6fiz2Cx2XEg
!

This race will be close. It's a swing district that had a Republican Congressman this decade- but now has Pelosi clone Darren Soto occupying the seat!

Earlier polls had us in a dead heat:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7BhkofPSF6OuRU&b=4KEb6Cy4WcB6fiz2Cx2XEg

BUT NOW RECENT POLLING SHOWS I'VE OPENED UP A SMALL LEAD!

With just days to go before election day, we can pull this upset off- but I need your help desperately!

Why am I surging? Because I've exposed Soto as attached to the hip to Nancy Pelosi!

“The fact is, I’m a progressive,” Soto said. "I am passionate about progressive issues."

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7BhkofPSF6OuRU&b=4KEb6Cy4WcB6fiz2Cx2XEg

This race will revolve around turnout of Trump voters. If Trump wins my district, I will too. Our country needs the President- and needs me to beat Soto so that we don't have Pelosi as Speaker anymore!

THIS RACE WILL BE CLOSE. I need your help most urgently to push me over the top! Join my 4,000 patriots who are helping me flip this district! I need your help to beat Soto and Pelosi!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7BhkofPSF6OuRU&b=4KEb6Cy4WcB6fiz2Cx2XEg

Trump is fighting for Florida. My district is a key area he's focusing on- and together we can win! Trump is overperforming among Hispanic voters. If we win here, we win Florida. That's why I need your help!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST the Marxist Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7BhkofPSF6OuRU&b=4KEb6Cy4WcB6fiz2Cx2XEg

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7BhkofPSF6OuRU&b=4KEb6Cy4WcB6fiz2Cx2XEg
today? We need TV ads and GOTV expenditures- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7BhkofPSF6OuRU&b=4KEb6Cy4WcB6fiz2Cx2XEg

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7BhkofPSF6OuRU&b=4KEb6Cy4WcB6fiz2Cx2XEg

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7BhkofPSF6OuRU&b=4KEb6Cy4WcB6fiz2Cx2XEg
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j7BhkofPSF6OuRU&b=4KEb6Cy4WcB6fiz2Cx2XEg
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
